programme.desc: From the front line of the Camp Fire, the deadliest wildfire in California history, the stories of residents who had to flee for their lives during the 2018 fire season. Scientists racing to understand what's behind the rise of record-breaking mega fires.

programme.title: Masterpiece Classic: Little Women
programme.desc: The March family fears the worst when Mr. March falls ill. As circumstances change for Meg, Jo, Beth and Amy, the family must come together to face their most difficult challenge yet.

programme.title: Congressman John Lewis and Andrew Aydin: The Story of March
programme.desc: A stirring stage presentation by legendary civil rights icon Congressman John Lewis and his co-author Andrew Aydin discussing their graphic novel trilogy, 'March.'

programme.title: Independent Lens: Tell Them We Are Rising: The Story of Black Colleges and Universities
programme.desc: Explore the pivotal role that historically black colleges and universities (HBCUs) have played in shaping American history, culture and national identity.

programme.title: Reconstruction: America After the Civil War
programme.desc: Discover how post-Civil War America was a new world. For African Americans, support for their social, economic and political gains did not last. The 1876 presidential election deals Reconstruction a blow as the forces of white supremacy ascend.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Reform
programme.desc: The district is in a state of change, Lindsay has moved to New York and the CPD is under scrutiny about the corrupt nature of its institution. The team attempts to bust a gun deal that quickly turns dicey when innocent people get involved.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: The Thing About Heroes
programme.desc: After a van explodes during a Chicago street festival, Muslim patrol officer Frank Toma goes missing and evidence piles up pointing to his involvement, but Burgess is desperate to prove his innocence.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Promise
programme.desc: When a young Latina woman is brutally murdered, Intelligence suspects she may have been working as a drug mule.

programme.title: WWE Raw
programme.desc: Great athletes and electrifying performers from the world of sports entertainment.

programme.title: Modern Family: The Cover-Up
programme.desc: Phil has a new client who happens to be 'his type.' Knowing that might get him in trouble with Claire, he tells some seemingly innocent lies, which then lead to more, and soon enough he's in a full spiral.

programme.title: Modern Family: Express Yourself
programme.desc: Phil has the crazy idea of going on a trip to Paris with Claire, however, they are both so ridiculously tired but try to push through it. Meanwhile, Jay has taken over their bathroom remodel, which proves hazardous to the family.

programme.title: Modern Family: Man Shouldn't Lie
programme.desc: Claire brings home a stray dog and gets the kids to help her hide it from Phil while she tries to find its owner. Unfortunately, her evasive behaviour only makes Phil try even harder to shower her with more attention.

programme.title: Modern Family: Crazy Train
programme.desc: Dede is getting remarried, and Manny convinces the family to take the train up to her wedding.

programme.title: Modern Family: Halloween 4: The Revenge of Rod Skyhook
programme.desc: Luke’s Halloween party isn’t the monster bash he dreamed of, and he is at risk of having the worst party of the year.

programme.title: Modern Family: Grab It
programme.desc: Jay's favourite place in the world, may be losing some of its charm when Phil considers becoming a member. At the Dunphy house, Claire mistakes her influence on Alex's life choices, and Hayley cares too much about what Alex thinks about hers.

programme.title: NCIS: Los Angeles: Exposure
programme.desc: When a news reporter announces the group responsible for the deadly explosion at a military-sponsored charity event, the team must investigate her claims and search for the attacker.

programme.title: NCIS: Los Angeles: Deep Trouble
programme.desc: When the team and DEA uncover the cartel's plan to slyly transport billions of dollars' worth of cocaine from Columbia to the U.S. using a submarine, Callen and Sam must quickly locate the missing vessel.

programme.title: Dateline: Captured
programme.desc: Amanda Lindhout was a freelance journalist who was kidnapped in Somalia and held in captivity for 15 months. This is the story of how she survived the ordeal and how her mother worked tirelessly to secure her release.

programme.title: Dateline: Inside the Hunt for El Chapo
programme.desc: Former DEA agent Andrew Hogan comes out of the shadows to detail his search for El Chapo with never-before-seen videos and photos of the hunt for the notorious drug lord.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation: Burn Out
programme.desc: When two young boys are reported missing, a known neighbourhood sex offender is the primary suspect. In an attempt to extract his confession, Grissom asks for the pedophile's help in catching the boys' abductor.

programme.title: NCIS: Los Angeles: Tuhon
programme.desc: Sam and Callen head to Mexico to search for Tuhon, a retired assassin they encountered on their very first case together. Meanwhile, Nate and Deeks stay in Los Angeles to assist with the investigation.

programme.title: NCIS: Dead Air
programme.desc: The team uncovers a sinister plan when a controversial DJ and a naval officer are shot to death.

programme.desc: A string of rapes inspires a group of vigilantes to unite against neighbourhood crime and the NYPD. The SVU squad struggles to find a lead in the case until one of the vigilantes is attacked.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Father Dearest
programme.desc: Detectives Benson and Amaro investigate the disappearance of a teenaged girl who had been looking for her biological father; a sperm donor. A suspect is found to be targeting vulnerable women.

programme.title: Grey's Anatomy: Slow Night, So Long

programme.title: Forensic Files: Plastic Puzzle
programme.desc: When a bicycle rider is struck and fatally injured in a hit-and-run accident, forensic investigators utilize an assortment of miniscule clues to determine the identity of the offending vehicle and eventually the person who was driving it.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Up in Smoke
programme.desc: When an elderly couple die in a housefire their son becomes the prime suspect. The son insists that he is innocent, and that his efforts to extinguish the fire made it worse. Investigators turn to science to determine the truth.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Dessert Served Cold
programme.desc: When a Massachusetts man dropped dead of an apparent heart attack, no one thought foul play was a possibility until police looked into his girlfriend’s odd behavior in the days before his death.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Music Case

programme.title: Death Row Stories: Death, Lies and Videotape
programme.desc: The execution-style killings of a Florida nightclub owner and two aspiring models are caught on camera.

programme.title: Death Row Stories: Predator or Prey?
programme.desc: Explore cases that pose hard questions about the U.S. capital punishment system.

programme.title: The Killer Truth: Blade of Betrayal
programme.desc: When a wealthy New York woman is found brutally murdered her home, detectives learn that her family isn’t as picture perfect as they seem.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Gold Rush
programme.desc: A man calls 911 saying his girlfriend shot herself, but the autopsy reveals that the gunshot wound was not self-inflicted.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Four on the Floor
programme.desc: A Native American woman is found murdered less than 10 miles from where a male Native American was murdered two years earlier. Police begin to wonder if a serial killer is on the loose.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Moss Not Grass
programme.desc: A young woman is found dead on a golf course in the Bahamas, and the evidence leads police to two suspects.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Material Witness

programme.title: Forensic Files: Hair of the Dog
programme.desc: With no forensic evidence found at a murder scene, investigators were baffled. But they suspected that the victim's dog had witnessed the crime.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Breaking News
programme.desc: When a young reporter is murdered in her apartment, and the two suspects are cleared of any wrongdoing, police must turn to a databank of well over 8000 felons to catch the killer, leading to the first conviction in the U.S, based on this evidence.

programme.title: Forensic Files: All the World's a Stage
programme.desc: Police must investigate one of their own when a detective says his wife shot herself in the head. While he claims he called 911 as soon as he could, evidence makes police doubt the detective's story.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Trial by Fire
programme.desc: A house erupts into flames on a winter night, killing one person and injuring another. The survivor blamed a kerosene heater for the fire, but the evidence did not match her story.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Marked for Life
programme.desc: In 1957 the police search for a man who committed several crimes in one night, including murder. Eventually, the case turned cold. Almost fifty years later, with the help of scientific advances, the investigators find their man.

programme.title: Sex and the City: The Good Fight
programme.desc: Once Aidan moves in to her apartment, Carrie feels crowded. Meanwhile, Samantha is unnerved when she realizes she is falling in love with her boss. Elsewhere, Miranda is worried that having sex will hurt the baby.

programme.title: Sex and the City: Change of a Dress

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Controversies and Legacies

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: No Good Deeds
programme.desc: With Rob's baby only a month away, the family is excited to celebrate and go all out to plan a baby shower for the couple, but, when Rob and Chyna get into a fight, the party is ruined.

programme.title: Flip It Like Disick: The Lord Is Back
programme.desc: Scott, Benny and Miki are almost finished with their latest flip property in Malibu, so Scott recruits a potential new team member, Willa Ford, to help with the finishing interior design touches.

programme.title: Flip It Like Disick: Family Matters
programme.desc: With Jed Smith officially purchased and the new layout for the property agreed upon, Scott is eager to get started with demo right away, but Willa and Miki are at odds.

programme.title: Flip It Like Disick: Miki vs. Malibu
programme.desc: After visiting a mega-flip property being built by Scott's real estate mentor, Ilan, Scott is inspired to redo the pool at his personal residence.

programme.title: Flip It Like Disick: Jungle Rules
programme.desc: With Miki feeling disrespected and a potential HOA shutdown looming, the team now faces major personal and logistical problems. Scott helps French Montana transform one of his rooms into a jungle-themed theater.

programme.title: Flip It Like Disick: Unexpected Help
programme.desc: With the HOA shutdown still keeping Jed Smith at a standstill, Willa and Benny renovate their offices. Scott looks for ways to make up for lost time and brings in outside help without telling Benny or Miki.

programme.title: Flip It Like Disick: More Money, More Problems
programme.desc: Scott and team encounter a problem at Jed Smith that could jeopardize the entire project. Scott attempts to get away from all the drama at Jed Smith by working with Willa to redesign his daughter Penelope's bedroom.

programme.title: Flip It Like Disick: Thank You
programme.desc: Scott contemplates his next move as the Jed Smith project has become more than he bargained for. Meanwhile, Scott and Ilan continue to disagree about what to do with the grotto at the Mark Wahlberg flip project.

programme.title: Flip It Like Disick: The Race to Finish
programme.desc: The team races to complete Jed Smith in order to get it listed and sold before the end of summer. Scott and his long-term girlfriend Sofia Richie look to buy a house together.

programme.title: Lost Gold of World War II: Death on the Mountain
programme.desc: A team of Americans attempts to solve one of the great mysteries of World War II. With the help of an eyewitness, they explore a mountain in the Philippines where Japanese general Yamashita is believed to have buried a vast treasure during the war.

programme.title: Lost Gold of World War II: X Marks the Spot
programme.desc: Excavation is put on hold when the team unearths a possible water trap. The team conducts a LiDAR scan to find another way into the mountain.

programme.title: Lost Gold of World War II: Dead Giveaway
programme.desc: The team uncover a potential booby trap, and their first hint of treasure in a cave that may have been a headquarters for General Yamashita during the war.

programme.title: Lost Gold of World War II: What Lies Beneath
programme.desc: The team triggers a possible water trap in the cave and is forced to stop digging. Martin believes the story rock indicates a tunnel behind a waterfall and the team brings in a Navy diver to explore the plunge pools and search for an entrance.

programme.title: Lost Gold of World War II: The Backdoor
programme.desc: Unable to find a tunnel at the waterfall, the team is guided by an animal marker to a boulder carved in the shape of a turtle. Following the direction of the turtle head, the team discovers a golden lily symbol indicating a secret backdoor entrance.

programme.title: Lost Gold of World War II: Nazi Concrete
programme.desc: The team believes there's a secret backdoor entrance to the mountain behind a unique formation of rocks. After battling a typhoon and possible Nazi concrete, they find a void 40-foot below.

programme.title: Lost Gold of World War II: Blood and Conspiracy

programme.title: The Curse of Oak Island: Lords of the Ring

programme.desc: A member of the team is held hostage by a man who is desperate to find his missing daughter. Elsewhere, Voight finds out that Bunny is bringing up new accusations on a case from his past.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Debts of the Past
programme.desc: After surviving a hit against him, Voight is convinced the culprit is a criminal he and Olinksy once put away. At the district, Atwater accidentally spills information about Ruzek's past, which unsettles Burgess.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Climbing Into Bed
programme.desc: After a botched undercover job, Ruzek is under scrutiny by the new Street Deputy Crowley who will determine his future with the unit.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: You Never Know Who's Who
programme.desc: A suspicious person call turns into a murder investigation when Burgess and her temporary partner discover the body of a dead man in an SUV.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: One Dead Kid, a Notebook and a Lot of Maybes
programme.desc: Intelligence sets out to find a missing teenaged boy who they believe poses a serious threat to the students at his wealthy school after finding disturbing drawings in his notebook.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Forget My Name
programme.desc: When Intelligence follows up on a tip Antonio and Halstead received from a reliable informant about an upcoming drug trade, the team is shocked to discover the mutilated body of a man.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Never Forget I Love You
programme.desc: When the decapitated body of a woman found in Lake Michigan is connected to Voight's social circle, Lindsay fears his relationship with the group may hinder his ability to approach the case objectively.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Now I'm God
programme.desc: A doctor with personal connections to Voight is under investigation when four of his patients are committed to Chicago Med after an overdose of chemo.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Knocked the Family Right Out
programme.desc: After a luxury condo is robbed, the team is shocked to learn that not only was the family fast asleep when the crime occurred, but their teenaged daughter was violated during the invasion as well.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Natural Born Storyteller
programme.desc: While pursuing a gangbanger, Burgess and Roman come across the body of an 8-year-old boy who was reported missing. Intelligence launches an investigation to find the killer.

programme.title: Movie: Baby Driver
programme.desc: A young man with a hearing problem constantly listens to music to drown out the ringing in his ears. He works as a getaway driver for a crime lord's gang, but when he meets a girl who seems to understand him he vows that his next job will be his last.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Them, Robot
programme.desc: Mr. Burns replaces the Springfield Power Plant's employees with robots, but decides to keep Homer as the sole human worker.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Beware My Cheating Bart
programme.desc: When Bart is forced to chaperone Jimbo's girlfriend at a movie, she ends up developing feelings for him, resulting in a whole bunch of trouble with the bullies at school.

programme.title: The Simpsons: A Totally Fun Thing Bart Will Never Do Again
programme.desc: When Bart sees a commercial for the ultimate cruise, he begs his parents for a family vacation. Low on cash, the only way they can go is if each family member sells one valuable item.

programme.title: The Simpsons: The Spy Who Learned Me
programme.desc: Marge becomes upset when Homer blurts out embarrassing remarks throughout a movie. After Homer suffers a concussion on the job, he seeks help during his time off to learn how to become a better husband.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Ned 'N' Edna's Blend
programme.desc: When the town of Springfield learns that Ned and Edna secretly got hitched, Marge offers to throw them a congratulatory reception.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Lisa Goes Gaga
programme.desc: Lisa tries to reverse her status as one of the least popular girls in school by ghostwriting positive things about herself on the school blog.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Moonshine River
programme.desc: The family travels to New York City in search of Bart's long-lost love who he wants to reconnect with. Lisa and Marge look forward to the trip and settle for the free 'Shakespeare In the Park,' which doesn't go as planned.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Treehouse of Horror XXIII
programme.desc: A Mayan Homer and Marge are witnesses to the prediction that 2012 will be the end of the world, the Springfield Subatomic Supercollider creates a black hole that terrorizes the city and Bart travels back in time to 1974.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Adventures in Baby Getting
programme.desc: When Marge's car falls into a sink hole, she buys the perfect replacement. However, she grows to hate it since, as she tells a shocked Homer, it would be too small if she wanted to have another baby.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Gone Abie Gone
programme.desc: When Grampa escapes from his retirement home, Homer and Marge frantically try to track him down by following clues that reveal secrets in Grampa's past.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Penny Wiseguys
programme.desc: Homer is shocked to discover that his bowling teammate is an accountant for Fat Tony.

programme.title: The Simpsons: A Tree Grows in Springfield
programme.desc: Lisa tries to cheer up a down-in-the-dumps Homer by winning him a 'MyPad' at the school auction. But he falls back into a funk when he breaks the magical tablet device.

programme.title: It's Always Sunny in Philadelphia: The Gang Goes to the Jersey Shore
programme.desc: Dee and Dennis take the gang to their favourite childhood vacation spot where things aren't quite how they remember.

programme.title: It's Always Sunny in Philadelphia: Frank Reynolds' Little Beauties
programme.desc: Frank accidentally gets into the child pageantry business and is terrified of coming across as a 'Diddler.'

programme.title: It's Always Sunny in Philadelphia: Sweet Dee Gets Audited
programme.desc: Desperate times call for sad and horrific times as Sweet Dee tries to get out of an IRS audit. The rest of The Gang institute a new democratic voting system.

programme.title: It's Always Sunny in Philadelphia: Frank's Brother
programme.desc: The Gang is shocked to meet Frank's long lost brother, Gino, when he unexpectedly arrives at Paddy's Pub and exposes a wealth of family secrets.

programme.title: America's National Parks: Great Smoky Mountains
programme.desc: Take a colorful journey through the seasons of the Great Smoky Mountains National Park.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: Here's Looking at Moo
programme.desc: Dr. Pol and his family are very much a part of their community. In honor of his dedication, Dr. Pol is surprised with an award in recognition of his work with 4H Club.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: Barking Bad
programme.desc: Dr. Pol, Charles and Dr. Brenda tackle the problems of a feisty alpaca, a troubled twosome of dairy cows and a miniature donkey with a fungus problem on its feet.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: Talk Turkey to Me

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: Santa Paws

programme.title: America's National Parks: Olympic
programme.desc: Experience the wildlife teeming in the Olympic peninsula’s coastline, forests and summits.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Mystery of Planet 9
programme.desc: Scientists have discovered a mysterious ninth planet on the very edge of our solar system. Ten times the size of Earth, this strange world could have moons with extraterrestrial life.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: The Universe's Deadliest
programme.desc: The universe is a dangerous place, and we explore the deadliest spots in the cosmos. Between earth and the edge of the universe, there are a million ways to die, and our crash test dummy is on a mission to reveal the worst.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Battle of the Dark Universe
programme.desc: Dark matter and dark energy compete for control of the cosmos; the winner will determine the fate of the universe. New discoveries might reveal which force will emerge victorious.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Hunting for Aliens
programme.desc: New innovations in space technology might mean we'll find alien life within our lifetimes, and using cutting-edge science, astronomers investigate shocking evidence that could lead to the greatest discovery in human history.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: The Interstellar Mysteries
programme.desc: New discoveries reveal that interstellar space, the space between the universe's stars, is not empty and unremarkable as previously thought, but full of weird objects and strange phenomena that might hold the darkest secrets of our cosmos.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Hunt for Alien Life
programme.desc: The latest discoveries suggest that we might be on the verge of discovering life beyond our planet, and scientists are investigating if earth's life began elsewhere in the universe, and whether we need to evolve to know for sure.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: The Search for a Second Earth
programme.desc: Astronomers seek the answer to a second earth with spectroscopy, direct imaging and telescopes. They hope to find evidence of atmospheres, magnetospheres and signs of life.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: The Interstellar Mysteries
programme.desc: New discoveries reveal that interstellar space, the space between the universe's stars, is not empty and unremarkable as previously thought, but full of weird objects and strange phenomena that might hold the darkest secrets of our cosmos.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Finding the New Earth
programme.desc: New discoveries have revealed thousands of exoplanets beyond our solar system, and some resemble earth enough that one could be a new home for humanity. But even with cutting-edge technology, finding the perfect one is the scientific challenge of the age.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Curse of Osiris
programme.desc: A camera captures a person inexplicably bursting into flames. An ancient statue at a museum appears to come to life at night. An alien-like creature is filmed in the sewers. Eerie lights caught on camera may explain a mysterious death.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: The Doomsday Swamp
programme.desc: A high-speed police chase ends when the fugitive makes an impossible getaway. Deep in Louisiana, a swamp devours 100-foot trees, and experts worry that a nearby town could be next. Three cars are recorded mysteriously levitating at a busy intersection.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Curse of the Monster Spider
programme.desc: A massive spider's web takes over a park, leading experts to investigate if this monstrous trap could capture a human. A tree spurts out thick red blood, and some believe it could be an undiscovered species of carnivorous plant.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Night of the Chupacabra
programme.desc: A camera captures footage of a Chupacabra-like beast. At an observatory on Hawaii's Mauna Kea, cameras record a mysterious explosion that looks like a nuclear bomb detonated in space. Video of spontaneous combustion is taken at a haunted bar.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Curse of the Mayan Treasure
programme.desc: An explorer searching for treasure at a Mayan sacrificial site is attacked by a mysterious underwater fog. Thousands of fish spontaneously jump to their deaths. Something alien appears over the skies of Lost Angeles.

programme.title: The Unexplained Files: Peruvian Alien Skull and Baltic Sea UFO
programme.desc: In Peru a tiny skeleton resists medical explanation and some believe it is either a missing link in human evolution, or proof of extra-terrestrial contact. In the Baltic Sea wreck detectives find a huge disc on the seabed.

programme.title: The Unexplained Files: Livestock Mutilation and Curse of the Ice Mummy
programme.desc: Horses and cattle around the world are found drained of blood. The German hiker who found the Neolithic ice mummy in the Alps is found frozen in a stream.

programme.title: The Unexplained Files: Alien Blood Rain, Carolina Beach Boom and Voynich Manuscript
programme.desc: Alien rain in Sri Lanka 2012. A fireball in the sky is followed by 60 days of days of red rain. Carolina Beach Boom- 2009 in North Carolina, Mike Hussey is disturbed by an earth-shattering sound.

programme.title: The Unexplained Files: Curse of Flannan Lighthouse and Aleshenka: Russian Mummy
programme.desc: In 1895, a lighthouse is built to warn ships of perilous rocks in the Flannan Isles. Historian Keith McCloskey investigates the theories after three lighthouse keepers disappear. A Russian police captain investigates the strangest case of his career.

programme.title: The Unexplained Files: Omens of the Mothman
programme.desc: Joaquin V Gonzalez is a small town in northern Argentina. Two strange events make this a UFO hot spot. In 2009 a strange creature is seen in West Virginia and more than 10,000 people suffer from a strange disease.

programme.title: The Unexplained Files: Are Aliens Attacking Our Nuclear Arsenal?
programme.desc: Across the globe, senior military personnel witness UFOs above nuclear weapons bases and in some cases UFOs are reported to shut down nuclear missiles.

programme.title: The Unexplained Files: The Yeti
programme.desc: New investigation of declassified Soviet files reveals evidence of an explanation for the grisly deaths of nine students who went missing in Siberia. Scientists examine clues that may prove the existence of a yeti.

programme.title: The Unexplained Files: Paranormal Highway of America
programme.desc: A pattern of eye-witness reports of UFOs along the 37th parallel, the 3000 mile long line that runs through the heart of the U.S sends ex-Deputy Sheriff Chuck Zukowksi to investigate.

programme.title: Murder Comes to Town: Say it Ain't So
programme.desc: The Long Branch Saloon is the local hangout for most everyone in the small town of Poteau, Oklahoma. That is until its beloved proprietor goes missing, leaving behind a splatter of blood and many unanswered questions.

programme.title: Murder Comes to Town: The Last Face She Saw
programme.desc: When the most popular pizza restaurant of little Claypool Hill, VA is turned into a horrific crime scene, everybody is stunned. With clues revealing more than robbery, law enforcement know they must move fast to catch the killer.

programme.title: Murder in the Heartland: Branches of Evil
programme.desc: Tray Phelps, a beloved father, son and fiancée was found beaten to death in his own driveway. The small town of Hayti, Missouri is stunned to discover that a web of evil lurks just beneath the surface of the seemingly idyllic hamlet.

programme.title: Murder in the Heartland: Shallow Grave
programme.desc: Christmas will never be the same for the two local residents of Noble, Oklahoma whose dog drops a human skull onto their front porch. After six years and no leads, the police must navigate the twists and turns of the victim's past to find redemption.

programme.title: Murder in the Heartland: Ashes to Alibis
programme.desc: Residents of Post Falls, Idaho, are shocked when devoted family man Bo Kirk vanishes, and his truck is found set ablaze. Bo's sister blames their estranged father, until released ATM security footage suggests a co-worker with piercing blue eyes.

programme.title: Southern Gothic: They Call Me Animal
programme.desc: After three teens vanish, a Texas town's worst fears are realized when they're found dead. Details of a related robbery identify a suspect, but after a rattling jailbreak, the city must mobilize the largest manhunt in state history to nab the culprit.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: The Cheerleader and the Hitman
programme.desc: When a widower and father of three is found dead outside his Long Island home, police have reason to believe shady business dealings may have caused his murder. But then a tip leads to three unlikely suspects, exposing dark family secrets.

programme.title: Murder in the Heartland: Witch Hunter
programme.desc: Christmas is ruined when hikers in New Mexico stumble across Roxanne Houston's shallow grave. The murder rocks the community of Taos and tension builds between those with small town values and the outsider lifestyle on the Mesa.

programme.title: Southern Gothic: They Call Me Animal
programme.desc: After three teens vanish, a Texas town's worst fears are realized when they're found dead. Details of a related robbery identify a suspect, but after a rattling jailbreak, the city must mobilize the largest manhunt in state history to nab the culprit.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: Burned Alive
programme.desc: On a back road in Mississippi, a popular 19-year-old girl is set on fire and left to burn alive. Her last words lead detectives down a road of dead ends and the case goes cold until a special agent taps into her location data and finds a suspect.

programme.title: Murder in the Heartland: Branches of Evil
programme.desc: Tray Phelps, a beloved father, son and fiancée was found beaten to death in his own driveway. The small town of Hayti, Missouri is stunned to discover that a web of evil lurks just beneath the surface of the seemingly idyllic hamlet.

programme.title: I'd Kill for You: Truth or Death
programme.desc: In rural Georgia, single dad, Donald Ray Skinner, meets a beautiful Mississippi blond, Allene Hawkins. She's also a single mom and sparks soon fly. They marry, but it won't be happily ever after. Behind their blissful façade stirs lethal deceit.

programme.title: I'd Kill for You: Wrestling with the Devil
programme.desc: In Yakima, Washington, high school athletic director Gabby Moore turns out winning teams and championship athletes. But when two of Gabby's protégés are unexpectedly drawn into his personal life a deadly game of love, loyalty, lust and betrayal arises.

programme.title: Fatal Vows: Murder by Proxy
programme.desc: Marcia's relationship with Texas trucker James endures resentment from Marcia's teenage daughter Shaina. But true devotion knows no bounds. Things are looking up until greed and deceit set off a chain reaction that leads to six arrests, and one dead body.

programme.title: Fatal Vows: Death in the Family
programme.desc: Kraig and Karen Kahler enjoyed a life of influence and privilege, but sexual obsession spun out of control and destroyed everything.

programme.title: Fatal Vows: Killing Time
programme.desc: Karla and Ray Porter are the envy of their neighbors. But after more than 20 years of marriage, Karla's loyalties are no longer with Ray. When he unearths her betrayal, his own dark side is revealed, and a bizarre chain of events is set into motion.

programme.title: Fatal Vows: Behind Closed Doors
programme.desc: Nurses Lara Crockett and Ricardo Muscolino meet on the night shift. He's ambitious and sets about creating a rich life for them and she's happy to go along.

programme.title: Fatal Vows: Sex, Lies, and Secret Texts
programme.desc: Cassie is a free-spirited bartender when she meets family-guy Brent - the rock to her roll. But a spark this intense is doomed to explode... and a bright light extinguishes in tragedy.

programme.title: Fatal Vows: A Thin Blue Line
programme.desc: Sheriff deputies with a perfect marriage reveal a shocking tale of good cop/ bad cop that can only end in a fugitive on the run.

programme.title: Fatal Vows: Living with the Devil
programme.desc: When Darren and Elizabeth marry eight weeks after meeting, no one thinks it's a good idea. The couple just doesn't care, until one of them turns up dead.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: Stranger Than Fiction
programme.desc: Outgoing Jackie Galloway is found strangled and bound with ritualistic knots. Police investigate suspects in her inner circle but are shocked when a chance encounter with a prowler leads them to discover the murderer is a budding serial killer.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: Fatal Family Secrets
programme.desc: A celebratory night turns deadly for the Whitaker family when they are gunned down at home. When investigators uncover a conspiracy, it will test one man's ability to forgive as he fights to save the criminal mastermind from the death penalty.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: Blood In the Sand
programme.desc: In 1984, the body of a 14-year old girl is discovered on the beach in San Diego, CA and police think it's related to the murder of another teen. After years of mystery, a clue yields an unbelievable suspect.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: Cabin 28: Horror in the Woods
programme.desc: A mother and three teens are murdered in the remote town of Keddie, California. Despite a trail of suspects and illicit activity, no one was ever brought to justice. But recently discovered evidence may be the key to finally cracking case.

programme.title: Inside Secret Societies: The Priory of Sion
programme.desc: Inside Secret Societies investigates the mysterious secret society known as 'The Priory of Sion' that traces its roots back to the 12th Century and is believed to protect incontrovertible, if heretical, information about the marriage of Jesus Christ.

programme.title: Inside Secret Societies: The Order of Assassins
programme.desc: The Assassins were one of the mostly deadly, notorious and secretive groups in the medieval world. Find out if the romance behind these brutally efficient killers is true and if their skills and tactics have been copied by today's Islamic terrorists.

programme.title: Evolution of Evil: Saddam: The Butcher of Baghdad
programme.desc: The story of Saddam Hussein, the sadistic tyrant who ruled Iraq with an utter contempt for humanity for 23 years, a man whose cruelty knows no limits and who'll stop at nothing to achieve the power of life and death over millions of people.

programme.title: Evolution of Evil: Mussolini: The Father of Fascism
programme.desc: This is the story of the rise and fall of the man who became a role model to Hitler and some of history's worst dictators of the twentieth century and beyond, Benito Mussolini.

programme.title: Evolution of Evil: Kim: North Korea's Evil Dynasty
programme.desc: North Korea's evil dictator, Kim Jong-il, ruled his country for 17 years without mercy. While personally enriching himself, he let his people starve to death and threatened to bring the world to the brink of a third world war.

programme.title: Evolution of Evil: Bin Laden: A Terrorist Mastermind
programme.desc: See how Osama bin Laden's journey unfolds from his roots as a privileged young Saudi boy to becoming the formidable leader of al-Qaeda, and his lifetime commitment to violent jihad against the West. This resulted in the horrific 9/11 attacks in 2001.

programme.title: Evolution of Evil: Hitler: The Benchmark of Terror
programme.desc: Adolf Hitler murders six million Jews and invades peaceful countries brutally killing anyone in his way. Find out what could turn a high school dropout into the most evil dictator the world has ever seen.

programme.title: Evolution of Evil: Kim: North Korea's Evil Dynasty
programme.desc: North Korea's evil dictator, Kim Jong-il, ruled his country for 17 years without mercy. While personally enriching himself, he let his people starve to death and threatened to bring the world to the brink of a third world war.

programme.title: Evolution of Evil: Bin Laden: A Terrorist Mastermind
programme.desc: See how Osama bin Laden's journey unfolds from his roots as a privileged young Saudi boy to becoming the formidable leader of al-Qaeda, and his lifetime commitment to violent jihad against the West. This resulted in the horrific 9/11 attacks in 2001.

programme.title: Evolution of Evil: Hitler: The Benchmark of Terror
programme.desc: Adolf Hitler murders six million Jews and invades peaceful countries brutally killing anyone in his way. Find out what could turn a high school dropout into the most evil dictator the world has ever seen.

programme.title: Evolution of Evil: Mussolini: The Father of Fascism
programme.desc: This is the story of the rise and fall of the man who became a role model to Hitler and some of history's worst dictators of the twentieth century and beyond, Benito Mussolini.

programme.title: Evolution of Evil: Saddam: The Butcher of Baghdad
programme.desc: The story of Saddam Hussein, the sadistic tyrant who ruled Iraq with an utter contempt for humanity for 23 years, a man whose cruelty knows no limits and who'll stop at nothing to achieve the power of life and death over millions of people.

programme.title: Inside Secret Societies: The Order of Assassins
programme.desc: The Assassins were one of the mostly deadly, notorious and secretive groups in the medieval world. Find out if the romance behind these brutally efficient killers is true and if their skills and tactics have been copied by today's Islamic terrorists.

programme.title: Weaponology: Waffen SS
programme.desc: The Waffen SS were Nazi Germany's ultimate warriors, armed with futuristic weapons and backed up by an unrivalled fanaticism. Weaponology travels through time to explore the men, machines, and moments that shaped this feared fighting force.

programme.title: Weaponology: Tanks
programme.desc: Uncover the killer genes in the tank's family tree.

programme.title: Weaponology: US Airborne
programme.desc: The United States Airborne are America's sky soldiers. They strike from above, hitting the enemy hard and fast.Weaponology takes you back through time to take a closer look at the men, machines and moments that shaped America's premier strike force.

programme.title: Weaponology: USMC
programme.desc: In the air, on land, at sea - the United States Marine Corps is the ultimate combined arms unit. World famous for winning the Pacific War, today's USMC is hunting down insurgents in Iraq. Weaponology uncovers the Corps' evolution.

programme.title: Against the Odds: Fighting Fox: Road to Hell
programme.desc: The paratroopers of Fighting Fox Company, 2nd Battalion, 506th Parachute Infantry Regiment fought and died from Normandy to Hitler's Eagle's Nest. Their sheer determination against the enemy was matched only by their devotion to one another.

programme.title: Against the Odds: The Marines at Hue
programme.desc: The city of Hue, South Vietnam, was the site of one of the fiercest battles of the Vietnam War. Three under-strength U.S. Marine battalions, consisting of fewer than 2,500 men, attacked and soundly defeated overwhelming, entrenched enemy troops.

programme.title: Against the Odds: The Heroes of Tarawa
programme.desc: Everything went wrong in America's first test of whether the Japanese-held islands of the Pacific, the key steppingstones to the doorstep of Japan, could be captured by across-the-beach infantry assaults.

programme.title: Against the Odds: Those Damned Engineers
programme.desc: In December of 1944, the seemingly defeated Germans secretly mustered 600,000 battle-hardened troops, including whole SS Panzer Divisions, into an all out offensive to capture Antwerp, the heart of the Allied supply chain.

programme.title: Against the Odds: Bloody George at the Chosin Reservoir
programme.desc: The untold true story of 'Bloody George,' an under strength, undermanned, marine rifle company, hastily called to serve their country in 1950 at the start of the Korean War. Their courage would be legendary, their fight, epic.

programme.title: Secrets of the Arsenal: Behind Enemy Lines
programme.desc: Four stories Behind Enemy Lines; goggles that shed light on the final mission of WWII; court documents detail a killer's last stand; a pistol signifies bravery for covert ops in Vietnam; a baseball signed by a ballplayer who became much more.

programme.title: Secrets of the Arsenal: Great Escapes
programme.desc: Four stories highlighting great escapes; a monocular that helped save a stranded pilot; the rifle that helped a WWII hero cheat death; the hand-drawn map used to destroy SAM sites; and a Saint's medal that served as one scout pilot's lucky charm.

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End: Small Yard, Big Dreams
programme.desc: A dedicated caregiver gets her lifelong wish of having her own pool. Lucas faces the pressure of not only building a dream pool, but has to create it in a small backyard. The team transforms the family's yard into a little oasis with big potential.

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End: Zen and the Art of Pools
programme.desc: Lucas takes his art of backyard transformations to Parrish, FL, where a couple requests the ultimate space of tranquility and relaxation.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: The Hiltz Camp
programme.desc: Chase and his team are in the woods of New Sharon, Maine, to help Rod save his rundown camp from falling into the pristine Kimball Pond. He'd like to patch up the holes and get his wife to come back to the camp, which means a lot of hard work.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Heirloom Home on the Shore
programme.desc: After 40 years of use, third-generation owners have decided to add facilities and living quarters to a family camp for large annual family reunions.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: A Cabin For the Whole Family
programme.desc: Chase and the team come in to rebuild and ultimately repair this cabin for Laurence and his family.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Love Yurts
programme.desc: In a show first, Chase and the crew are tasked with a relocation and land manifestation of a family yurt on an island on Togus Pond. The team enter uncharted waters knowing they have to move quickly before the pond freezes.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Dated Cabin Turned Retreat
programme.desc: Chase and his team take on a dated and dysfunctional cabin in Belgrade Lakes, one of Maine's most desirable regions. They try to turn the cabin into the perfect family retreat with a budget of $40,000 and six weeks.

programme.title: Paid Program
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Mega Decks: An Ideal Family Deck With a Wood-Burning Fireplace
programme.desc: Randy and Kim want a place for their kids to hang out with their friends, as well as a place to connect and bond as a family, so they've decided to turn their old patio into a family party deck.

programme.title: Mega Decks: A Double Decker Deck With Out-of-the-Box Elements
programme.desc: With a half a million-dollar budget, this deck spares no expense. With features like an elevator, mahogany decking, three skylights, and glass walls and floors.

programme.title: Mega Decks: A Blockbuster BBQ Deck Overlooking a Golf Course
programme.desc: Ed and Becky live next to a golf course. Their old deck is weathered and crumbling, and can only be used a few months a year. They challenge the Mega Crew to build a $200,000 deck that will serve as the ultimate spot to barbecue and relax.

programme.title: Mega Decks: An Entertainment Mecca With Glass Walls
programme.desc: The team transforms a useless, small, and shabby two-level deck into a double decker party zone with all the familiarities of home. Included are 18-foot high ceilings, 11-foot tall glass panels, and more audio and visual elements they've ever added.

programme.title: Mega Decks: A Treehouse Deck for a Dream Retirement
programme.desc: After years of constant relocation, retired military officers Joe and Maddie have decided to turn their Colorado home into a dream retirement.

programme.title: Mega Decks: Mountain Majesty Retreat
programme.desc: A Texas family transforms the existing deck of their vacation home into a luxurious mega deck. It features a gable roof with a skylight outside. Inside, a rustic great room gets natural log siding and a floor to ceiling fireplace with custom masonry.

programme.title: Mega Decks: Three Decks, Three Pergolas, a Swim Spa, and a Water Feature
programme.desc: Brad and Ronnie have gorgeous mountain views and five acres of land, but their patio and decks are faded and cracked. They have four separate outdoor spaces and the Mega Crew is challenged to update all of them.

programme.title: Mega Decks: A Log Cabin Lookout With a Wrap-Around Porch
programme.desc: Garth is challenged to create a modern, spacious deck while maintaining a log cabin feel. His plan includes redoing their entire wrap-around porch, adding a fire pit, and expanding the main area to become a fully enclosed glass living space.

programme.title: Mega Decks: A Four-Season Party Deck for a Large Family
programme.desc: John and Bonnie have a very large family and a very small deck. And with their six adult children living nearby, they really want a place for the family to gather. So, they've decided to turn their old deck into the ultimate party deck.

programme.title: Mega Decks: Dramatic Cliffside Triple Deck
programme.desc: Transforming this home's 20 year old deck into a mega deck requires a complete demo and rebuild. Plans include redoing a kids' play deck and a master bedroom deck. The challenge is that the property sits on the side of a cliff with a 40 foot drop.

programme.title: Mega Decks: A Concrete Jungle with a Lot of Warmth
programme.desc: The Mega Deck team transforms a tiny, cramped deck into the perfect outdoor entertaining space with 1600 square feet of luxury.

programme.title: Mega Decks: A Fireside Retreat With a Rustic Feel
programme.desc: The team tears down a dilapidated and useless deck to make room for a $200,000 rustic retreat. Even with design changes and delayed materials, they're able to create a space with a fireplace, skylights, a fire pit, and rustic accents.

programme.title: Holmes: Next Generation: One Good Deed Deserves Another
programme.desc: A woman who lost her husband, the neighborhood 'Good Samaritan,' needs help completing many of the DIY projects he had started around the house. So Next Generation is stepping in, and stepping up, to 'Make Things Right' for the widow.

programme.title: Holmes: Next Generation: Hiding in Plain Sight
programme.desc: A single homeowner is too proud to ask for help with the maintenance issues and repairs that come with living in an older home. When neighbors begin complaining, Next Generation steps in to help her improve the curb appeal and remove the backyard pool.

programme.title: Holmes: Next Generation: Far From Home
programme.desc: A couple relocating to a different part of the city needs help updating their kitchen before putting their house on the market. After a local contractor let them down and drained their budget, Next Generation swoops in to 'make things right.'

programme.title: Holmes: Next Generation: And Baby Makes Three
programme.desc: Mike Holmes and his kids tackle a renovation that has fallen off the tracks for expectant parents. Next Generation is on a time-sensitive mission to finish the nursery and only working bathroom in the house prior to the baby's arrival.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Clams and Cannoli
programme.desc: Mouthwatering midway munchies are on the menu at the Delaware County Fair in Walton, N.Y., where Noah Cappe goes wild for the spaghizza, packs on the pork with freshman 15 fries, snaps to attention for the veteran's clams n' corn.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Camp Pop
programme.desc: Noah Cappe heads to northern Indiana, where the Hoosiers in Valparaiso are doing things right at the Porter County Fair. The Super Ramen Dog combines two delicious foods Noah didn't know belonged together, the Elephant Ear Taco.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Deadwood, SD
programme.desc: Casey's nationwide nosh brings him to Deadwood, South Dakota. He's in this Black Hills outlaw town to go back in time at an old west saloon, chow down on a fried state staple and tackle one tough hombre.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Miami, Florida
programme.desc: Casey Webb's cross-country food frenzy brings him to Miami, Florida, where he first tackles a triple-layer burger. Next, he delights in some innovative, Cuban-inspired ice cream flavored with cream cheese, guava and cookies.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Manchester, New Hampshire
programme.desc: Casey Webb's tasty travels bring him to Manchester, New Hampshire, for an epic portion of barbecue that's served on a shovel at KC's Rib Shack. At local favourite Mr. Mac's Mac and Cheese, he only has eyes for their magnum opus.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Denver
programme.desc: Adam visits the Mile-High City for burgers with enough toppings to fill a dartboard, some Rocky Mountain oysters, and a showdown with the biggest burrito in the West.

programme.desc: Alton journeys through the history and science of the greatest of all raw meat dishes: steak tartare.

programme.title: Good Eats: Your Pad or Mine (Thai)

programme.desc: Theodore's new talking-teddy bear is driving Alvin and Simon nuts. Alvin is none-too thrilled about going back to school. That is until he sees the new Principal and then it's love at first sight.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: A Is for Alien/ Jeanette Enchanted
programme.desc: When Theodore disappears from his bed, Alvin is positive that he has been kidnapped by aliens. The Chipmunks and Chipettes join forces in order to offer Jeanette a magical, fairy-tale birthday.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Sister Act/ Lil' T
programme.desc: Following a fight with Brittany, Eleanor decides to move in with Alvin and his brothers. When his brothers won't listen to Theodore's song, he posts a video of himself rapping on the Internet and it becomes a mega-hit.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: What a Gem/ Family Spirit
programme.desc: When Alvin sees a sparkling diamond buried in his neighbor's rose garden, he's sure she's responsible for the recent diamond heist. Alvin tries to get out of the annual family day picnic with Dave to go to the big soccer game.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Spaced Out/ Transparents
programme.desc: Timmy wishes for an authentic alien; Cosmo and Wanda must pose as real parents.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Dreamgoat/ The Same Game
programme.desc: Timmy feels sorry for the town's prize goat; everyone becomes the same.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Boy Toy/ Inspection Detection
programme.desc: To have an adventure with his Crimson Chin action figure, Tommy wishes himself doll-sized.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Father Time/ Apartnership
programme.desc: Timmy time-travels to prevent his father from winning a trophy; Cosmo and Wanda split up.

programme.title: The Loud House: Making the Grade/ Vantastic Voyage
programme.desc: When Lincoln's four-year-old sister, Lisa, gets put into his 5th grade class, his social standing is at stake. Sick of their family van always falling apart, the kids decide to try and trick Dad into buying a cool new van.

programme.title: The Loud House: Change of Heart/ Health Kicked
programme.desc: Clyde, desperate to learn how to act normal around Lori, enlists Leni's help. Worried that Mom and Dad are hurting their health from not being active, the kids encourage them to exercise.

programme.title: The Loud House: Write and Wrong/ Purrfect Gig
programme.desc: Mom tries to convince a newspaper editor that her kids are perfect in order to land a parenting advice column job. When the McBrides go out of town, they hire Luna to catsit but the job becomes more demanding than she imagined.

programme.title: Danger Force: Mime Games
programme.desc: Bose must try and stop The Toddler from breaking into The Man's Nest when Danger Force and Captain man are called to Paris.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: The Thing/ Hocus Pocus
programme.desc: When Squidward is totally covered in mud, leaves and gunk, the residents of Bikini Bottom think he's some sort of monster coming to terrorize the town. Later, Spongebob gets a brand new magic kit and, after practicing all day, tries to show off.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: All That Glitters/ Wishing You Well
programme.desc: SpongeBob's spatula breaks mid-patty flip; Mr. Krabs installs a wishing well near the Krusty Krab and sends SpongeBob down the well in a bucket to collect the coins.

programme.title: It's Pony: Plants/ Heston's Coat
programme.desc: When Annie and Pony plan a camping trip, Pony becomes afraid of plants. Then, Heston loans Annie his new coat, but Annie knows Pony will ruin it.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: The Lost Episode
programme.desc: Spongebob is jellyfishing when he realizes that he wants to fly with the jellyfish.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Extreme Sports/ Squirrel Record
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick try to join the extreme sports team the Drasticals. Also, Sandy finds a book of world's records and tries to break them all with SpongeBob's help.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Culture Shock/ F.U.N.

programme.desc: Bubble Bass gets stranded with Patrick in a swamp looking for a lost action figure.

programme.desc: Murr, Joe, Q and Sal return to the dentist's office, then try to make each other laugh in a food court tournament. Then, the big loser strips for a rowdy group of ladies who will never be able to un-see the sorry state of his skin.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Indecent Proposal
programme.desc: Sal, Murr, Joe and Q don absurd disguises to trick unsuspecting receptionists, then try to convince strangers to sign off on some unusual emails. Plus, the big loser turns a harmless dance class into a dance with danger.

programme.title: 2 Broke Girls: And the Look of the Irish

programme.title: 2 Broke Girls: And the Grate Expectations

programme.title: Family Matters: Swine Lake
programme.desc: Eddie enrolls in ballet lessons to improve his basketball skills.

programme.desc: Rachel and Phoebe stay behind in New York while the others travel to London for Ross' wedding to Emily.

programme.title: American Dad!: Magnificent Seven

programme.title: Reconstruction: America After the Civil War
programme.desc: Discover how post-Civil War America was a new world. For African Americans, support for their social, economic and political gains did not last. The 1876 presidential election deals Reconstruction a blow as the forces of white supremacy ascend.

programme.title: BBC World News: America
programme.desc: BBC correspondent Katty Kay anchors BBC AMERICA's award-winning hour-long, U.S.-targeted nightly newscast.

programme.title: Finding Your Roots: Children of the Revolution

programme.title: Behind the Woman: Finding a Space
Secrets of the Dead: Building Notre Dame
programme.desc: An in-depth investigation into the centuries-long construction of Notre Dame de Paris.

programme.title: Inside the Vatican
programme.desc: Gain unprecedented access to one of the most important places in the Christian world. Nestled in the city of Rome, the Vatican is the headquarters of the Catholic Church and an independent city-state.

programme.title: Sound of Giving
programme.desc: A talented group of musicians sing for the joy of giving back to their community and a good cause.

programme.title: Inside the Vatican
programme.desc: Gain unprecedented access to one of the most important places in the Christian world. Nestled in the city of Rome, the Vatican is the headquarters of the Catholic Church and an independent city-state.

programme.title: Ribbon of Sand
programme.desc: The beautiful view of North Carolina's Cape Lookout contains a set of natural barrier islands, which are in danger of disappearing.

programme.title: Independent Lens: Jim Allison: Breakthrough
programme.desc: Meet a visionary doctor on a journey to find a cure for cancer. Nobel Prize winner Dr. Jim Allison spent decades waging a lonely but ultimately fruitful quest to discover a way the immune system can stop cancer in its tracks.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow: Little Rock (Hour Two)
programme.desc: Journey to Little Rock to see fantastic finds, including a 1983 Truman Capote 'Playboy' manuscript.

programme.title: Sit and Be Fit: Neglected Areas of Body
programme.desc: Exercises for posture using a towel and band and a large ball for balance are demonstrated.

programme.title: Peg + Cat: The Compost Problem/ Raiders of the Lost Arch
programme.desc: By mixing different types of compost just right, Peg and Cat turn garbage into a garden. Peg and Cat head into a deep, winding cave in search of the famous Lost Arch.

programme.title: Cyberchase: True Colours
programme.desc: Hacker becomes a good guy. A new, reformed Hacker runs for election against Motherboard, claiming to have done five good deeds, and promising to turn over a new leaf. Can the kids find a counter example that proves Hacker is lying?

programme.title: SciGirls: High-Tech Fashion
programme.desc: Hallie wires up an electrifying gown with friends and 'Project Runway' designer Diana Eng.

programme.title: Nova: Rise of the Superstorms
programme.desc: Dive into the devastation wrought by Hurricanes Harvey, Irma, and Maria. Explores how scientists can better predict these storms, and what the 2017 season tells us about the likelihood of future storms.

programme.title: History Detectives: Bird of War, Lincoln Oath and War Spoils of a Peace Chief
programme.desc: Two patches with the symbol of a bird dropping a bomb may be from a World War II unit. A tiny swatch of red fabric can be traced back to a pivotal moment in U.S. history.

programme.title: Great Yellowstone Thaw
programme.desc: See how spring brings new life and a break from the brutal winter temperatures. But the dangers aren’t over. Wildlife families face a torrent of water cascading down the mountains as the great thaw gets underway. Beavers are in particular danger.

programme.title: Wild Weather
programme.desc: A global group of experts risk their lives to demonstrate the power of wind, water and temperature. They transform these simple 'ingredients' into something spectacular and powerful for everyone to understand.

programme.title: Nova: Rise of the Superstorms
programme.desc: Dive into the devastation wrought by Hurricanes Harvey, Irma, and Maria. Explores how scientists can better predict these storms, and what the 2017 season tells us about the likelihood of future storms.

programme.title: Masterpiece Classic: Little Women
programme.desc: As circumstances change for Meg, Jo, Beth and Amy, the family must come together to face a challenge.

programme.title: American Masters: Louisa May Alcott: The Woman Behind 'Little Women'
programme.desc: 'Little Women' author Louisa May Alcott is immediately recognized as a morally upstanding citizen, but what many do not know is that she was a democratic free thinker and had progressive ideas about women's rights.

programme.title: Orchard House: Home of Little Women
programme.desc: The 350-year-old home in Concord, Massachusetts where Little Women was written is highlighted. Orchard House uniquely inspired Louisa May Alcott to write the beloved novel at a desk in her room that her father made especially for her.

programme.title: Latino Americans: Prejudice and Pride
programme.desc: Witness the creation of the proud 'Chicano' identity as labour leaders organize farm workers in California, and as activists push for better education opportunities for Latinos, the inclusion of Latino studies and empowerment in the political process.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Decaying Morality
programme.desc: Benson and Rollins find a teenage girl in the street and she fingers a man with a criminal record. A conflict of interest arises when it's discovered the suspect has a pending lawsuit against the NYPD.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Parole Violations
programme.desc: Detective Carisi's sister Bella prepares for her wedding and the upcoming birth of her child, but then her fiancee falls into bad habits and accuses his parole office of rape.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: No Surrender
programme.desc: Fin revisits his military roots when a fellow Army Ranger struggles to recover from a sexual assault.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Genes
programme.desc: An investigation hits a nerve with Benson when a suspect claims his genetics caused him to commit rape.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Net Worth
programme.desc: A top-level investment banker accuses her billionaire client of rape.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Spellbound
programme.desc: The SVU investigates a charismatic spiritual healer when a client claims he incapacitated and assaulted her using hypnosis.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Mama
programme.desc: An Alzheimer's patient claims she was raped but her illness casts doubt on the case. Fin's sergeant orders come in.

programme.title: Modern Family: Spread Your Wings
programme.desc: Sick of having the ducklings around the house, Claire and the kids seize an opportunity to help expedite the ducks leaving the nest while Phil is off visiting Alex at college.

programme.title: Modern Family: Clean for a Day
programme.desc: Before Claire officially takes over Jay's closet business, she decides she must get the house in order and make the family clean out the clutter; unfortunately, Phil and Luke can't bear to part with anything.

programme.title: Modern Family: Thunk in the Trunk
programme.desc: Jay lets his jealousy get the best of him when a life-size cutout of Gloria for her grocery store hot sauce display solicits all kinds of unsavoury attention from men. He enlists Manny as his accomplice in a poorly orchestrated heist.

programme.title: Modern Family: The Storm
programme.desc: A huge thunderstorm brings wide power outages, and the whole family congregates at Jay and Gloria's to use their generator. Jay has one foot out the door, though, desperately trying to make it to a reunion with some old Navy buddies.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Sanctuary
programme.desc: After a female jogger is brutally murdered in the park, Rixton and Atwater arrive to find two suspects fleeing the scene. When the men enter a church, the priest blocks the police from entering the building.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: I Remember Her Now
programme.desc: The body of a young girl is found crushed in an abandoned building after she runs away from a treatment centre for troubled girls. Voight sends Halstead to work undercover inside the centre, where he believes something shady is happening.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Seven Indictments
programme.desc: When a charred body is found in a torched house, Intelligence must work to identify the victim, as well as a young boy who is found badly injured inside. As they work towards identifying the victim, they uncover a web of secrets and lies.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Favor, Affection, Malice or Ill-Will
programme.desc: When Lindsay is tipped off about a grieving father looking to avenge his daughter's death, Olinsky goes undercover as a hitman-for-hire. Meanwhile, Ruzek comes back after finishing his undercover assignment, only to have Voight knock him down to patrol.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation: Post Mortem

programme.title: NCIS: Los Angeles: Windfall
programme.desc: When the team investigates a case involving a former marine who is being tracked down by members of al Qaeda for embezzling money from Iraq, Hetty assigns Nell to join Deeks in the field. Meanwhile, Eric is given a new partner in Ops.

programme.title: NCIS: Worst Nightmare
programme.desc: A young girl's kidnapping turns into much more when her grandfather complicates the investigation.

programme.title: NCIS: The Admiral's Daughter
programme.desc: Director Vance gives DiNozzo a special assignment to bring home an Admiral’s daughter from Paris, but he must turn to his NCIS team for help after he enters a controversial crime scene.

programme.title: NCIS: Honor Thy Father
programme.desc: The team investigates whether a fire on a U.S. Navy ship was accidental or an intentional diversion for an escape. Gibbs travels to his childhood home following the news of his father's passing.

programme.title: NCIS: Twenty Klicks
programme.desc: When Gibbs and McGee's missions overseas is compromised, the team races to locate them before a Russian Mercenary group gets to them.

programme.title: NCIS: Kill the Messenger

programme.title: NCIS: So It Goes
programme.desc: When an NCIS case reveals a connection to Ducky's estranged childhood best friend, he and Special Agent Bishop travel to London for interviews with family and co-workers of his friend.

programme.title: NCIS: Choke Hold

programme.title: NCIS: The San Dominick
programme.desc: During a joint Coast Guard and NCIS training exercise at sea, Gibbs and Agent Borin spot a deceased man overboard, who is discovered to be a missing crew member from a ship 60 nautical miles away. Gibbs boards the ship that was commandeered by pirates.

programme.title: Martin: Dead Men Don't Flush

programme.title: Martin: Woman With a Past
programme.desc: After he finds out that a recent radio guest once dated Gina, Martin becomes jealous.

programme.title: Martin: The Parents Are Coming
programme.desc: Gina wants Martin to meet her conservative parents, but Martin feels uneasy. Wanting to make a good first impression, he takes advice from Tommy and Cole.

programme.title: Martin: Three Men and a Mouse
programme.desc: When Gina is at Martin's house sleeping, she hears noises in the middle of the night. Thinking it's a robber, she begs Martin to check it out. Martin discovers that it's a mouse.

programme.title: Martin: The Great Payne Robbery
programme.desc: When Martin's neighbor is robbed, Martin holds a neighborhood crime watch meeting.

programme.title: Martin: Baby It's Cole'd Here
programme.desc: Cole's mother interrupts his evening with his girlfriend and demands back rent from him.

programme.title: Fresh Prince of Bel Air: Love Hurts
programme.desc: Will's ego takes a beating when Lisa has to beat up a guy for him.

programme.title: Fresh Prince of Bel Air: Will's Up the Dirt Road
programme.desc: Will gets sued while trying to impress Lisa by taking pictures of celebrity homes.

programme.title: Fresh Prince of Bel Air: Will Steps Out
programme.desc: Will decides to fight fire-with-fire when he suspects that Lisa is dating another guy.

programme.title: Fresh Prince of Bel Air: Same Game, Next Season
programme.desc: Lisa's father is so impressed with Will that he intrudes on their budding relationship.

programme.title: Movie: Bad Boys II

programme.title: Black Ink Crew: Mr. Robinson If You’re Nasty

programme.title: Black Ink Crew: My Name is Earl

programme.title: Black Ink Crew: Moving Too Funny for Me

programme.title: Black Ink Crew: Black Ink Matters
programme.desc: Ceaser and the crew are still reeling from the news that the landlord wants them out of 113th in 30 days. Ceaser decides to do everything in his power to save the shop. Meanwhile, Donna has an uncomfortable chat with Tati, and Walt hits rock bottom.

programme.title: Movie: Anything for Love
programme.desc: Katherine believes men are intimidated by her career, creates an internet dating profile claiming she is an executive assistant rather than a high-powered executive.

programme.title: Movie: Surprised by Love
programme.desc: A young businesswoman tries to convince parents to approve of her boyfriend. She finds herself questioning her own life choices.

programme.title: Movie: The Perfect Bride
programme.desc: A fitness instructor who runs a bridal boot camp falls in love with the fiancé of one of her new recruits.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Transplant
programme.desc: Blanche has to make a life-altering decision when the sister she hates needs a kidney.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: The Triangle
programme.desc: A doctor Dorothy dates also gets Blanche's pulse racing, until he makes a pass at her.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: On Golden Girls

programme.title: The Golden Girls: The Competition
programme.desc: Sophia and Rose compete against Dorothy and Blanche in a bowling tournament.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: The Break-In
programme.desc: Terrified by a burglary, the girls explore means to protect themselves, including a dog.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Blanche and the Younger Man
programme.desc: Blanche dates her young aerobics instructor; Rose is overprotective of her mother.

programme.title: Frasier: Frasier Has Spokane
programme.desc: Frasier is excited about his show going to Spokane, until he arrives for the broadcast.

programme.title: Frasier: The Guilt Trippers
programme.desc: Frasier secretly follows Roz to her family home in Wisconsin to pose as her boyfriend.

programme.title: Frasier: Moons Over Seattle
programme.desc: Niles' scheme finally succeeds when he convinces Daphne's dad to return to her mother.

programme.title: Frasier: The Ring Cycle
programme.desc: Daphne prompts Niles into a spur of the moment ceremony in the city of romance, Reno.

programme.title: Frasier: Enemy at the Gate
programme.desc: Frasier embarks on an act of disobedience when he squares-off against a parking garage.

programme.title: Frasier: Proxy Prexy
programme.desc: Frasier installs his father Martin as the puppet leader in a bid for condominium control.

programme.title: Frasier: Kissing Cousin
programme.desc: When Roz's cousin blows into town, Frasier seems unable to please this raging party-girl.

programme.title: Frasier: Tales From the Crypt
programme.desc: After Bulldog plays a harsh office prank on Frasier, he vows revenge on his old nemesis.

programme.title: I Love Lucy: The Passports
programme.desc: Lucy and Fred try to find people who can prove they were born.

programme.title: I Love Lucy: Staten Island Ferry
programme.desc: Fred's fear of becoming seasick threatens plans for Ricky's European band tour.

programme.title: I Love Lucy: Bon Voyage
programme.desc: The Mertzes and the Ricardos begin sailing for Europe.

programme.title: I Love Lucy: Second Honeymoon
programme.desc: Ricky's schedule doesn't give him much time for Lucy.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: The Heart Attack
programme.desc: Sophia suffers an apparent heart attack and the girls nervously await the paramedics.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Stan's Return
programme.desc: Dorothy's ex-husband, Stan shows up to settle a piece of land they bought on their honeymoon. This leads to Dorothy and Stan spending the night together. Meanwhile, Rose and Blanche plan a vacation that Sophia is not invited on.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: The Custody Battle
programme.desc: Dorothy's sister, Gloria, comes to Miami for a visit and asks Sophia to come live with her in California. Meanwhile, Blanche is furious when Rose is cast as Lady Macbeth in a local play, and not her.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: A Little Romance
programme.desc: Rose has been dating Dr. Jonathan Newman and begins to think their relationship is leading to the altar. However she begins to have second thoughts especially since he's a midget.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: That Was No Lady
programme.desc: Dorothy latest boyfriend, Glen, gives her a shock when he tells her he's married. She surprises herself when she finds herself sneaking around to be with him. Meanwhile, Blanche unloads her old car on Rose in order to buy a new one.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: In a Bed of Rose's
programme.desc: Late one evening, Rose brings a man home and they spend the night together. However, in the morning she finds that he has passed away. Even worse, she later discovers he was married.

programme.title: Home and Family
programme.desc: Actress Carly Hughes, chef David Codney and 'Breathe Again' author Niki Hardy visit.

programme.title: Movie: All for Love
programme.desc: A romance novelist worries she's lost her touch after a string of unsuccessful events. She sets her new book around a Navy Seal hero and dives into research with a retired Seal who teaches her skills she didn't know she had.

programme.title: Movie: Fashionably Yours

programme.title: Movie: Date With Love

programme.title: The Office: Andy's Play

programme.desc: An architect became ill and died just before she was to testify in a criminal trial.

programme.desc: An employee of a dry-cleaner was raped and murdered in the store with two eyewitnesses.

programme.desc: Forensic science helps investigators unravel a twisted tale of lust, greed and deception.

programme.desc: After a sudden snow storm, Everest cares for a white wolf cub as they work together to help the PAW Patrol find them. Famous wrong-way explorer, Travelling Travis, accidentally takes Chickaletta to the North Pole where they run into... crocodiles.

programme.title: Bubble Guppies: Triple Track Train Race
programme.desc: An old-fashioned steam engine train is trying to compete in the Triple Track Train Race but a herd of cows wanders onto the tracks, so the Bubble Guppies must think fast so that Ol' Number 9 can finish the race.

programme.title: Bubble Guppies: A Furry Tale!
programme.desc: Hansel and Gretel have to get Bubble Puppy and Bubble Kitty home safe to the Furry Godmother, but they're being stalked by a witch along the way.

programme.title: Blue's Clues & You: Laugh With Blue
programme.desc: Josh is being silly but still can't get Blue to laugh. We play Blue's Clues to figure out what will make Blue laugh. While we look for clues we find patterns with a goofy gopher and locate all the mixed-up things in Silly Town.

programme.title: PAW Patrol: Pups Save Luke Stars/ Pups Save Chicken Day

programme.title: PAW Patrol: Pups Save a Dragon/ Pups Save the Three Little Pigs

programme.title: PAW Patrol: Pups Save a Blimp/ Pups Save a Chili Cook-Out
programme.desc: Capt. Turbot's weather blimp is taken by Mayor Humdinger, who plans to use it to change the weather in Foggy Bottom. Mr. Porter's stove explodes right before the chili cook-off.

programme.title: PAW Patrol: Mighty Pups Charged Up: Pups vs. Three Super Baddies
programme.desc: The three super baddies take the Mighty Pups' meteor. They must get it back and Charge Up to stop them before the team of baddies destroys Adventure Bay.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Super Evil Aquatic Villain Team Up Is Go/ Chum FRICASSee
programme.desc: Plankton teams up with Man Ray to take over the Krusty Krab and then-the world! Hahahahahaha!

programme.title: The Loud House

programme.title: The Loud House: Tripped!
