programme.desc: Todd stresses out Julie when he insists on investing in an oil painting of the family. After a kitchen fire, Grayson decides the Chrisleys need some emergency response training.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Hearts and Crafts
programme.desc: Chase rescues Faye when Todd demands on chaperoning her to a Senior Dance. Meanwhile, Todd struggles to come up with a Valentines gift for Julie when she suggests something handmade.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Top Dog
programme.desc: Todd's opinion embarrasses Julie when she offers to organize a children's art fair. Meanwhile, the race is on for top dog when Faye and Grayson enter their pups into a pageant.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Panic at the Pageant
programme.desc: Todd takes on too much as the family heads to Florida to run their first Miss Florida USA pageant. Faye makes a rash purchase and is called out on it by Todd.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: No Men for Old Country
programme.desc: Todd's manhood gets called into question during a vacation with family and friends. Meanwhile, Chase has to make amends with Chloe after they get into a fight.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Baking Up is Hard to Do
programme.desc: Todd attempts to be supportive when Julie prepares desserts for a restaurant Grand Opening. Meanwhile, Chase tries to get back in Savannah's good graces as she deals with insecurities.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Running Gout of Time
programme.desc: Julie questions her decision to let Chase help her and Allison train for a 5K. When Todd is diagnosed with gout, he struggles to understand why his family has no sympathy.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Ride or Die
programme.desc: When Julie's stress reaches a breaking point while Todd comes up with a plan to alleviate it. Chase helps Nanny learn to ride a bike.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Going for Broker
programme.desc: After Todd signs a development deal, he fuels a competition between Julie, Chase and Savannah to be the listing agent. Meanwhile, Grayson decides to help Todd get over his fear of snakes.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: America's Next Todd Model
programme.desc: Faye takes the law in to her own hands when the neighborhood kids annoy her. And Todd gets a second shot at becoming a male model.

programme.title: Sex and the City: The Good Fight
programme.desc: Once Aidan moves in to her apartment, Carrie feels crowded. Meanwhile, Samantha is unnerved when she realizes she is falling in love with her boss. Elsewhere, Miranda is worried that having sex will hurt the baby.

programme.title: Sex and the City: All That Glitters
programme.desc: Carrie befriends a gay guy but she soon realizes that she has to fight for his attention when they go out together. While under the influence of ecstasy, Samantha confesses to Richard that she loves him. Miranda's co-worker tells everyone she is pregnant.

programme.title: Sex and the City: Change of a Dress
programme.desc: When Carrie tells Aidan she wants to take things slower, he refuses to give her time and moves out of their apartment the following day. Meanwhile, the monogamy bug bites Samantha when she finds out Richard is sleeping with other women.

programme.title: Sex and the City: Ring a Ding Ding
programme.desc: Carrie has a serious financial problem; Miranda and Steve grapple with raising a baby.

programme.title: Sex and the City: A Vogue Idea
programme.desc: Carrie begins her new job at Vogue; Charlotte hosts Miranda's baby shower.

programme.title: Sex and the City: I Heart NY
programme.desc: Carrie becomes nostalgic about her relationship with Mr. Big and the city she loves.

programme.title: Sex and the City: Anchors Away
programme.desc: The girls try to come to terms with Miranda's new life with Brady; Carrie meets a sailor.

programme.title: Sex and the City: Unoriginal Sin
programme.desc: Samantha gets back together with Richard; Carrie has a dry spell in her love life.

programme.title: Sex and the City: Luck Be an Old Lady
programme.desc: The girls head to Atlantic City for a 'girls' weekend; Samantha can't trust Richard.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: The Kardashians Take NYC
programme.desc: The Kardashians hit NYC for Fourth of July weekend. Kim must confront her ex-boyfriend, Reggie Bush over her newfound love interest, Miles Austin.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Kim Becomes a Stage Mom
programme.desc: Kim pushes Kendall to a breaking point when trying to help with her modeling career in New York. Kris and Scott come to blows when Scott keeps Kris from having a key to his and Kourt's house.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: The Former Mrs. Jenner
programme.desc: Kris decides to change her name back to Kardashian, much to Bruce's displeasure. Kim is tired of people asking if her butt is real and gets an x-ray to set the world straight.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Out of Wedlock
programme.desc: Kris and Kourtney come to blows when Kourtney contemplates having another child out of wedlock. Kris gets ordained to perform a friend's wedding.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Thicker Than Water
programme.desc: After a big blow up, Rob admits to Kourtney that he doesn't hang out with her anymore because he hates Scott. Kris thinks Bruce is losing his hearing and insists he sees a doctor.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Kendall Goes on Birth Control
programme.desc: Bruce finds out Kendall is taking birth control and decides it's time to talk about the birds and bees. Kim discovers a serious rash on her legs and fears her career may be over.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: The Have and Have Nots
programme.desc: Bruce teaches Kendall and Kylie a lesson about how fortunate they are. When Kris's incontinence issues get worse, Khloé and Kourtney tease her until she agrees to do something about it.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: What Happens in Vegas, Stays in Vegas
programme.desc: Scott goes to Vegas for a club appearance, and Kourtney fears he'll revert back to his old ways. Kylie and Kendall grow annoyed when Kris decides to be more involved in their lives.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Talk to My Agent
programme.desc: After being humiliated on 'Dancing with the Stars' and on stage with Prince, Kim decides she wants to learn to dance. Scott tries to become Kylie and Kendall's manager, which angers Kris.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: The Family Vacation
programme.desc: Bruce takes the family to Bora Bora to celebrate his 20th anniversary with Kris. Kim's new boyfriend, Kris Humphries, pushes Kim too far, upsetting the family.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Getting to Know You
programme.desc: While in Bora Bora, Kourt struggles to get Scott and Rob to make up and learns the truth about Scott's drinking. Kris's body image issues threaten to ruin her anniversary.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Trouble in Paradise
programme.desc: While in Bora Bora, Rob's insecurity about not having a career prompts him to lash out on Kim. Kourt gives Scott an ultimatum.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Kendall's Sweet 16
programme.desc: Kendall Jenner is turning 16, and all she wants for her birthday is a low-key party and a tiny tattoo.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Who's Your Daddy
programme.desc: Kris decides to pursue a DNA test to prove Khloe's paternity. Kourtney angers Kim when she takes over relocating DASH and Bruce goes to extremes to get the family's attention.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Momager Dearest
programme.desc: Kourt takes her grudge against Kris to a new level. Kim wants payback after Bruce forces her to overcome her fears and Kendall and Kylie start working for Seventeen Magazine.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Everybody's Wigging Out
programme.desc: Rob hurts Bruce's feelings when he says he never had a male role model growing up. Kris' road rage gets to be too much and the family thinks Kim's lost it when she starts wearing wigs.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: The Family That Plays Together ...
programme.desc: Bruce pressures Kris to signing Brandon to her new music company. Kourtney doesn't appreciate Scott's romantic gesture. Kris tries to get the family to play tennis again.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: The Man in the Memoir
programme.desc: Kris runs into the man she had an affair with over 20 years ago and wonders if she should arrange another meeting with him.

programme.title: Chopped: Chicken Challenge
programme.desc: The competitors must stay steady and focused as they take on three chicken-themed rounds in this special competition. The chicken in the first basket looks strikingly strange.

programme.title: Chopped: Eyes on the Prize
programme.desc: Mock meat and an unusual green powder set the level of difficulty high in round one, and an Italian-Japanese mashup ingredient in the entree round threatens to mess up the chefs' plans.

programme.title: Chopped: Ooey, Gooey Cheese!
programme.desc: The chefs take on a melted cheese theme with the hope of giving the judges stretchable, craveworthy dishes. A platter of comfort food yumminess is at the center of a decadent first basket.

programme.title: Chopped: Beat the Judge: Tiffani
programme.desc: Three determined chefs return to the Chopped kitchen eager to take on Chopped judge Tiffani Faison, but first they have to battle each other.

programme.title: Chopped: Beat the Judge: Amanda
programme.desc: Three champions arrive back in the Chopped kitchen with their sights set on taking down a formidable foe, esteemed judge Amanda Freitag.

programme.title: Supermarket Stakeout: Lay'er On Me
programme.desc: Chefs are forced to noodle on the definition of noodles as they meet Alex Guarnaschelli to stakeout Fry's Marketplace in Phoenix, Ariz. One chef struggles with their ballpark bite and nearly strikes out.

programme.title: Supermarket Stakeout: Sweet Gamble
programme.desc: It's a high-stakes stakeout at Smith's in Las Vegas, Nevada, as the chefs gamble with unsuspecting shoppers' carts to create the best nacho platter. The final two chefs gamble for a sweet and salty win.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Quick and Easy: Take Five
programme.desc: Ree Drummond is making four meals on four days, and they all have just five ingredients. For breakfast, she whips up Chilaquiles, a Mexican breakfast with Osage County style.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Haley's Having a Baby
programme.desc: Ree Drummond is making freezer food for her friend and assistant Haley to enjoy after she has a baby. Ree assembles her mean green pasta casserole and a batch of white bean and sausage soup for easy dinners.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Faster Pasta
programme.desc: Ree Drummond is making pasta dishes in no time at all. She whips up steakhouse pasta with grilled steak, and her lemon pasta pronto is scattered with glorious flecks of pink and green.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Drummond Home Cooking
programme.desc: Ree Drummond is making a special meal to deliver to Beverly, the curator of the Drummond family's historic home and museum. Recipes include grape lemonade, old fashioned chicken stew, and lemon raspberry cream cake.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: To the Nth
programme.desc: Ree Drummond is taking some of her favorite recipes over the top! Her mac and cheese stuffed peppers are beer-battered and served with cilantro lime cream and her grilled French toast is finished with grilled strawberries.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Staying Home 2
programme.desc: Ree Drummond is home on the ranch and sharing great ideas for quarantine cooking. Her daughters Paige and Alex, nephew Stuart and her friends Mauricio step in as the crew shoot the show on their phones. Ree raids the pantry to make tomato soup 2.0.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Chicken Four Ways
programme.desc: Ree shares four of her favourite chicken recipes, including white chicken enchiladas, and crispy chicken florentine melt.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: Teen Chefs
programme.desc: Four talented teen chefs are taking over Flavortown, and Guy Fieri gets things started by having them flip a chicken pot pie into a high-end dinner. Then, a roll of the dice decides the parameters of their international dishes.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: Ultimate Asian Food Showdown
programme.desc: Asian cuisine takes over Flavortown as four chefs face Guy Fieri's challenges. He gives them a list of ingredients for their noodle dishes and makes them use tiny shopping carts to shop for their rice dishes.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: Guy's Eggs-treme Games
programme.desc: Guy Fieri isn't a fan of eggs, but that may change when he brings four egg-ceptional chefs to Flavortown for a culinary competition all about eggs.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: All-Seafood Battle
programme.desc: Four seafood specialists battle it out in Flavortown. Guy Fieri limits the chefs to just ten ingredients in the first round, and then all the ingredients for their second dish must start with the same random letter.

programme.desc: When Cora gets a job as a substitute teacher, she is tested by some of the toughest kids.

programme.title: Movie: Love and Basketball

programme.title: Movie: Blood Father

programme.title: Movie: Saw
programme.desc: Detectives search for Jigsaw, a kidnapper who plays vicious mind-games with his victims until he can manipulate them into killing either themselves or each other. Meanwhile, two men awaken to find themselves imprisoned and the killer's new target.

programme.title: Destination Fear: St. Albans Sanatorium
programme.desc: The team reveals a terrifying twist when they revisit St. Albans Sanatorium in Radford, Virginia, a location so awful that Chelsea quit last time and vowed she would never return.

programme.title: Destination Fear: Eloise Psychiatric Hospital
programme.desc: Dakota, Chelsea and Tanner investigate one of the most-haunted locations in Michigan, Eloise Psychiatric Hospital. The team begins to lose its grip on reality as it is subjected to unexplained screams, slamming doors and rampant poltergeist activity.

programme.title: Destination Fear: Madison Seminary
programme.desc: Dark forces conspire against the team as they investigate the Madison Seminary, one of the most-haunted locations in Ohio. Terrifying voices, shadow figures and physical contact with a demonic entity leaves them stunned and shaken to the core.

programme.title: Destination Fear: Statler Hotel
programme.desc: Dakota's team is pushed to their limits when they check into a historic hotel in Buffalo, NY. Disembodied voices and shadows are everywhere, but the haunted elevators prove most terrifying when communications fail and they each find themselves alone.

programme.title: Destination Fear: West Virginia State Penitentiary
programme.desc: The team heads to Moundsville, West Virginia, to investigate what was once one of the top ten most-violent prisons in America. Dakota fears he may have to leave some part of his soul behind after he is targeted in a horrific physical attack.

programme.title: Destination Fear: Fairfield County Infirmary
programme.desc: The team's terrifying road trip takes them to a house of horrors in Lancaster, Ohio. When Dakota tasks each member to explore the property all alone, Alex encounters something so evil it wouldn't be believed if not caught on video.

programme.title: Destination Fear: Pennhurst State School
programme.desc: The team faces their biggest paranormal challenge yet when they roll up to an abandoned asylum in Spring City, Pennsylvania. The hissing, violent entities within leave them wondering if they'll ever return home from their terrifying road trip.

programme.title: Ghost Nation: Haunting of Weems Plantation
programme.desc: Jason, Steve and Dave investigate strange noises and unnerving apparitions inside a pre-Civil War home in Locust Grove, Georgia. They uncover evidence that the haunting could be related to the evil plantation owner who once lived on the property.

programme.title: Ghost Nation: The Novelist's Nightmare
programme.desc: The team answers an urgent call to investigate the Mantua, New Jersey, home of a horror writer and his family. They suspect the terrifying apparitions and aggressive paranormal activity may be linked to a poltergeist.

programme.title: Vanderpump Rules: Prank Wars
programme.desc: Brett insults Scheana while interviewing her for his YouTube channel, while Katie hosts a girls' night complete with wine, cheese, and a guest list that doesn't include Kristen. Raquel stands up for her boyfriend James when Lala questions his sobriety.

programme.title: Vanderpump Rules: Shame Hangover
programme.desc: Schwartz makes amends with Katie after their blowout fight, while Beau opens up to them about his plans to propose to Stassi. Lisa reprimands Danica about improving her attitude and Brett sets his sights on a newly single Dayna.

programme.title: Vanderpump Rules: Mr. and Mrs. Schwartz, Take Two
programme.desc: The group travels to Las Vegas to celebrate Schwartz and Katie’s second wedding, but leaves a heartbroken Kristen behind. Beau calls Stassi’s father to ask permission to propose and Schwartz finds a bar in his bag that isn't Katie’s.

programme.title: Vanderpump Rules: Witches of WeHo Whine
programme.desc: Lisa helps Beau plan a secret engagement party for Stassi, but Stassi's insecurities threaten everything when she explodes on Kristen at a wine event. Meanwhile, Lala and James make music together and bond over their sobriety struggles.

programme.title: Vanderpump Rules: Til Death Do Us NOT Part

programme.title: Family Karma: An Engagement to Remember
programme.desc: Vishal and Richa's engagement party has finally arrived, and relationships are tested as everyone gathers. Amrit's mom introduces his boyfriend as only a 'friend,' and Anisha must confront the realities of her personal life, or lack thereof.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Beverly Hills: Busted BBQ
programme.desc: Lisa Vanderpump takes a tour of the space that Ken wants for a new restaurant, and it turns out to be a sex shop! Eileen flies to Italy to spread her sister's ashes. Kyle hosts a barbecue where the main course is confrontation.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Beverly Hills: Backwards in Heels
programme.desc: Kyle and Lisa Vanderpump plan their burlesque-themed joint anniversary party, but Lisa isn't happy when she finds out Faye Resnick is on Kyle's guest list. Kyle gets angry with Kathryn when she speaks out against Faye as well.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Beverly Hills: Please Welcome Erika Jayne!
programme.desc: Kyle and Lisa Vanderpump take a cold plunge and try cryotherapy with Yolanda. Erika invites the ladies to see her wild alter ego perform in an over-the-top gay club in San Diego. Lisa Rinna goes on a mission to find out who said what to Yolanda.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Beverly Hills: Hearing Problems
programme.desc: The ladies have brunch at Kathryn and Donnie's San Diego home, but emotions run high when Kyle's sister Kim is brought up and Kathryn reveals pain from her past. Eileen gets an Erika Jayne makeover, while Kyle meets with an old friend.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Beverly Hills: Spinning a Web
programme.desc: The women work up a sweat in a spin class to raise money for charity, and follow up the workout with a lunch full of allegations. Yolanda calls out Kyle for gossiping at the table then confronts Lisa Vanderpump for questioning her children's health.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Beverly Hills: Not Easy to Love
programme.desc: Yolanda hosts a dinner party and surprises her friends with an impressive musical guest. Lisa Rinna upsets Eileen by not coming clean about some real feelings. Erika is wary of Kathryn after finding out Kathryn betrayed her confidence to Lisa Vanderpump.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Beverly Hills: Objection, Your Honor
programme.desc: Erika hosts a dinner party to introduce her husband, Tom, to the ladies, and Kathryn receives positive news during a hearing test. The ladies get their hands dirty doing charity work. Yolanda is criticized for hanging out with Kim and Brandi.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Beverly Hills: Hearing is Believing
programme.desc: The ladies support Camille's cancer charity by shopping for diamonds. Lisa Vanderpump rallies her friends for a march that's dear to her heart. Eileen confronts Lisa Vanderpump about her possible manipulation, while Lisa Rinna admits her trust issues.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Beverly Hills: Lymes in the Sand
programme.desc: At a glittering gala in New York, Yolanda receives a Lyme disease awareness award, which erases any doubts Kyle had about Yolanda's illness. Also, the women travel to Dubai and attempt to live in a different culture.

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Beverly Hills: Dubai Daze

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Beverly Hills: Goodbye Dubai
programme.desc: The women continue their vacation in Dubai and enjoy some retail therapy at an over-the-top mall. Lisa Vanderpump attempts a new apology to Eileen on top of the world's tallest building, the Burj Khalifa. Erika gives Kathryn a birthday makeover.

programme.title: Forged in Fire: Tournament Round One
programme.desc: In the first ever Forged in Fire Tournament, four different classes of metalsmithing professionals will compete over five weeks for the chance to win the biggest Forged in Fire prize ever--$50,000.

programme.title: Forged in Fire: Tournament Round Two
programme.desc: In Round Two of the first ever Forged in Fire Invitational Tournament, four armorers must forge a Damascus blade out of something familiar: plate armor.

programme.title: Forged in Fire: Tournament Round Three
programme.desc: In Round Three of the first ever Forged in Fire Invitational Tournament, the smiths that survive two brutal rounds of testing return to their home forges to recreate a multipurpose Medieval weapon of war - the Knightly Poleaxe.

programme.title: Forged in Fire: Tournament Round Four
programme.desc: In Round 4, four modern metal workers forge a needle point Damascus blade. After elimination, the two remaining metal workers create the duel-ready Flamberge Rapier.

programme.title: Forged in Fire: Tournament Finals
programme.desc: In the final round of the invitational tournament, our winning farrier, armorer, blacksmith and modern metal worker face off to forge the longest round one weapon in the show's series: the Wakizashi. Only two smiths remain to recreate the Nodachi.

programme.title: Forged in Fire: Crusader Sword
programme.desc: The forge heats up as our four bladesmiths struggle to create a Japanese hardening technique on their signature blades. After a difficult first round of testing, the remaining two bladesmiths head home with just five days to forge the Crusader Sword.

programme.title: Forged in Fire: Butterfly Swords
programme.desc: Crafting Chinese Butterfly Swords, the final two bladesmiths face twice the work, and twice the pressure, in their attempt to claim the title.

programme.title: Forged in Fire: The Pata
programme.desc: Prior winners return to prove who among them is the best of the best by forging a blade using canoe damascus.

programme.title: Forged in Fire: The Lion Spear
programme.desc: Initially, the bladesmiths must try to craft a hatchet from oddly shaped steel pieces. The two most successful smiths head back to their home forges to produce replicas of the vicious Maasai Lion Spear.

programme.title: Forged in Fire: The Sengese
programme.desc: Four bladesmiths must forge a fully functional serrated knife using steel from hand scissors. The remaining two competitors return to their home forges to create a unique and challenging weapon from history: the sengese.

programme.title: Outlaw Bikers: Bandido Nation

programme.desc: From the Antarctic Peninsula to the Patagonian steppe, the wildlife faces a constant battle for survival.

programme.title: Wild Colombia

programme.title: Wild Central America: Guatemala

programme.title: Wild Central America: Costa Rica

programme.title: Wild Costa Rica

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: The Upper Hoof
programme.desc: It's a full day for the vets when Dr. Pol wrangles a foursome of gutsy cows who refuse their pregnancy checks and Dr. Brenda deals with an after-hours emergency when Sisco the horse is down with colic.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: Pol-tergeist
programme.desc: Halloween is coming and Dr. Pol is in his element dealing with jumping, flailing and barking clientele.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: Nerves of Steer
programme.desc: Horses are driving Dr. Pol wild as he works to fix chunky runny noses, gruesome gashes and even penile problems.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: Udderly Frozen
programme.desc: Vets, calves and cats are all having a hard time after getting the cold shoulder from Jack Frost this winter. Farmers, livestock and pets work to adapt while Dr. Pol stays warm the only way he knows how — by keeping busy.

programme.title: Dr. Oakley: Yukon Vet: Baby Boom
programme.desc: Dr. Oakley delivers a calf and a litter of puppies and treats a pregnant goat.

programme.title: The Unexplained Files: Alien Flights of Horror
programme.desc: Across America run-ins between planes and UFO's are reported, sometimes with terrifying and tragic consequences. Find out if there is danger in our skies and if the government is covering up the truth behind these encounters.

programme.title: The Unexplained Files: Lost Giants of Georgia and the Bridge of Death
programme.desc: In Borjami Valley, a team of experts uncover bones they believe belongs to a human that is over nine feet tall. Also, strange reports of a large, underwater creature have come from people living near the remote Lake Labynkyr in Siberia.

programme.title: The Unexplained Files: Death From the Sky and Mexican Chupacabra
programme.desc: In Britain, a missing man's body is found with electrocution burns and a green ointment on him, his case is mysteriously closed down. Plus, hundreds of vampire-like attacks in Mexico leave livestock drained of blood.

programme.title: Unearthed: Egypt's Forbidden Pyramids
programme.desc: The oldest pyramids in Egypt are also some of its strangest, and using new, hi-tech archaeological methods, experts reveal the long-lost secrets of these mysterious ancient marvels.

programme.title: Egypt's Unexplained Files: Murder on the Nile
programme.desc: Experts use cutting-edge FBI investigative technology to reopen a 3,000-year-old cold case; what they discover reveals a gruesome tale of betrayal and murder in ancient Egypt.

programme.title: Unearthed: Hunt for the First Pyramid
programme.desc: A strange site called Saqqara is home to Egypt's very first pyramid, and here, experts use cutting-edge tech to reveal why the ancient Egyptians started building pyramids and if the mummified animals found here are evidence of a bizarre religious cult.

programme.title: Egypt's Unexplained Files: Murder on the Nile
programme.desc: Experts use cutting-edge FBI investigative technology to reopen a 3,000-year-old cold case; what they discover reveals a gruesome tale of betrayal and murder in ancient Egypt.

programme.title: Unearthed: Mystery of the Cursed Pyramid
programme.desc: Egypt's strange bent pyramid is one of the world's most mysterious ancient mega-structures, and new discoveries help experts investigate its dark secret: if it was always intended to look so bizarre, or if something went catastrophically wrong.

programme.title: Engineering Catastrophes: Death Ray Skyscraper
programme.desc: A skyscraper so dangerous that it can melt cars, a bridge fiasco, and a stadium roof on the brink of disaster are engineering catastrophes in need of repair, and experts use cutting-edge technology to reveal if they can be fixed.

programme.title: Engineering Catastrophes: Peril at the Airport
programme.desc: An airport that's sinking into the sea, a strange tower that goes wrong, and a dangerous bridge in Venice are engineering catastrophes in need of repair, and experts use cutting-edge technology to reveal if they can be fixed.

programme.title: Engineering Catastrophes: Holes from Hell
programme.desc: Engineering catastrophes include a giant tunnel boring machine stuck underground, a village sinking into a mountain, and massive holes that could derail a train.

programme.title: Engineering Catastrophes: Disaster in Vegas
programme.desc: Experts assess a giant sinkhole, a multi-million dollar road to nowhere, and a wind turbine on the brink of disaster, and determine if these engineering catastrophes can be repaired.

programme.title: Survivorman: Jungle
programme.desc: Les Stroud has only a few items to aid him in surviving a week marooned on Costa Rica's Osa Peninsula. Outfitted with swimming goggles, three ballpoint pens, a multi-tool and the clothing on his back, Les is once again struggling to survive.

programme.title: Survivorman: Arctic Tundra
programme.desc: Stranded on northern Baffin Island, Survivorman Les Stroud learns harsh lessons in solo arctic survival in 24-hour daylight.

programme.title: Survivorman: Papua New Guinea
programme.desc: Les Stroud is stranded and left to survive in the jungles of Papua New Guinea.

programme.title: Survivorman: Australian Outback
programme.desc: 'Survivorman' Les Stroud gets stranded in the Australia Outback when his ultra light airplane runs out of fuel.

programme.title: Survivorman: Sierra Nevada
programme.desc: Search and Rescue is called in when Les Stroud gets lost in the Sierra Nevada Mountains.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Jungle Werewolf
programme.desc: A strange beast is spotted in a remote Brazilian town. A cataclysmic blast sparks fears of nuclear disaster. When a child displays superhuman powers, some fear it's the devil's work.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Attack of the Fire Devil
programme.desc: A man is recorded surviving two lightning strikes in moments. Cameras spot strange lights in the sky in Norway, turning a remote area into a UFO hot spot. A bizarre glowing object is caught on tape at a museum, and some wonder if it's an alien artifact.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Chasing Bigfoot
programme.desc: An eerie creature is recorded stalking Georgia's ancient forest, and some believe it's Bigfoot. Terrifying explosions rock the streets of Manhattan. Cameras record a mysterious object diving into a deadly volcano, leaving experts stumped.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Monster of the Deep
programme.desc: Strange footage captures a mystifying monster from the deep, baffling marine biologists. Bizarre ghost lights haunt North Carolina mountains for centuries. When a giant explosion is caught on tape in New Mexico, investigators fear the US is under attack.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: Fallen Angels
programme.desc: In 2002 a 12-year-old girl from Oregon City, OR goes missing on her way to school and the whole town is clamoring to find her. The police investigation offers little in the way of leads, and then the unthinkable happens - a second girl disappears.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: What Happened to Baby Lisa?
programme.desc: In 2011, a 10-month-old baby girl goes missing from her home in Kansas City. The family fears she's been kidnapped by a drifter, only to be accused by the police of being responsible for her disappearance.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: Marked for Murder
programme.desc: Friends and family are stunned when an esteemed criminal law professor and father of two, is executed in his garage. Investigators follow a series of leads that take them on a statewide hunt through Florida, in search of the murderous masterminds.

programme.title: Diabolical: Masking Evil
programme.desc: A burning car is found by the side of a highway on the same night a single mother of two is reported missing. These two events are connected, and connecting the dots will lead investigators to a notorious criminal who has been hiding in plain sight.

programme.title: Diabolical: Caught in the Cover-Up
programme.desc: In West Bloomfield, Michigan, a simple affair between two coworkers turns complex as the two lovers are willing to do anything...even commit murder... to protect their darkest secret.

programme.title: Reasonable Doubt: Murder at her Doorstep
programme.desc: When a pregnant woman finds a box at her door, she picks it up and it explodes -- instantly killing her and her unborn baby. A multi-year investigation ensues, and her ex is convicted. Now, Mike Johnson's mom and daughter seek help to prove his innocence.

programme.title: Hometown Homicide: This Just In
programme.desc: After college co-ed Jessica O'Grady vanishes late one night after leaving to see her boyfriend, locals are left to wonder if she was kidnapped.

programme.title: Diabolical: Caught in the Cover-Up
programme.desc: In West Bloomfield, Michigan, a simple affair between two coworkers turns complex as the two lovers are willing to do anything...even commit murder... to protect their darkest secret.

programme.title: Reasonable Doubt: Murder at her Doorstep
programme.desc: When a pregnant woman finds a box at her door, she picks it up and it explodes -- instantly killing her and her unborn baby. A multi-year investigation ensues, and her ex is convicted. Now, Mike Johnson's mom and daughter seek help to prove his innocence.

programme.title: Hometown Homicide: Have you Seen Me?
programme.desc: Debora Gail Moody vanished into thin air from her home in Ludowici Georgia. A decade passes in her case with no answers, but her family persisted by posting billboards all around town. Eleven years later, a confession reveals the chilling details.

programme.title: Diabolical: Family or Foe
programme.desc: A young family in La Mirada, CA is out for an evening stroll when terror strikes. For investigation nothing seems to add up. Is it random violence or a mastermind at work? The truth will take years to emerge.

programme.title: Pandora's Box: Unleashing Evil: Dungeon of Dread
programme.desc: When an off-duty police officer in San Francisco happens upon a minor theft at a lumberyard one Sunday afternoon, he unwittingly jumpstarts an investigation into one of California's deadliest, most depraved serial killers: Leonard Lake and Charles Ng.

programme.title: Pandora's Box: Unleashing Evil: Blood and Oil
programme.desc: In 2012, a missing person case in North Dakota grabs the attention of Homeland Security. Investigators unravel a scheme involving stolen fracking profits, a ruthless conman and his murderous partner, and at least two victims of their boundless greed.

programme.title: Pandora's Box: Unleashing Evil: Home Sweet Hell
programme.desc: A suspicious gun store robbery in Maryland piques the interest of the ATF, and ignites an investigation into violence, arson, and murder. As detectives zero in on the suspect, they find themselves face-to-face with an unlikely killer.

programme.title: Pandora's Box: Unleashing Evil: Bloodlust
programme.desc: When an officer pulls over a reckless driver in a routine traffic stop, he unlocks the key to a series of murders. Investigators from various jurisdictions work in tandem to track a sadistic killer with a penchant for torture, robbery, and bloodlust.

programme.title: Pandora's Box: Unleashing Evil: A Handsome Devil
programme.desc: When a Luzerne County detective follows up on a series of home invasions as a courtesy to a friend and veteran, his investigation brings him face-to-face with a serial sociopath guilty of far more than mere breaking and entering.

programme.title: Pandora's Box: Unleashing Evil: Death Wish
programme.desc: A park ranger in Texas pulls over a suspicious truck filled with marijuana. The passenger flees deep into the desert, unleashing a manhunt that will unearth something far more sinister--and bizarre--than detectives could ever have imagined.

programme.title: Pandora's Box: Unleashing Evil: Homicide on the Range
programme.desc: A suspicious disappearance in Virginia piques the interest of authorities, and ignites a multi-jurisdictional investigation. A routine inquiry into the missing man's finances exposes a heartless killer with a checkered past - and a penchant for violence.

programme.title: Pandora's Box: Unleashing Evil: A Murder She Wrote
programme.desc: An Iowa mother is hailed a hero when she shoots an intruder in her home. But as the case evolves, investigators learn things are far from what they seem. Detectives face off against a master manipulator hell-bent on revenge at any cost.

programme.title: Pandora's Box: Unleashing Evil: Tainted Love
programme.desc: In the fall of 1994, an elementary school principal is found tied to a tree outside Oklahoma City, launching a nationwide manhunt for Franklin Delano Floyd, and exposing a staggering, decades-long reign of terror and abuse.

programme.title: See No Evil: The Long Walk Home
programme.desc: A father-to-be is shot while out for a morning walk, leaving his wife a widow. Security footage from the scene reveals his final, shocking moments.

programme.title: See No Evil: We See You, Kelsey
programme.desc: A teenage girl disappears from a Kansas Mall. The only clue for detectives are the haunting final images of her on surveillance video. Somewhere in these frames hides the answer and a killer.

programme.title: See No Evil: No Good Deed
programme.desc: On September 28th 2014, Diane Cunningham is bludgeoned to death in her bedroom. The only clues are receipts from Walmart, a ferry crossing, and a casino. Security footage reveals a prime suspect with a motive, but not everything is quite as it seems.

programme.title: See No Evil: Michigan City Murder
programme.desc: On April 23, 2016, car salesman Hufracio Arteaga is found stabbed to death in his Michigan City office. Surveillance cameras in the area may have filmed the fatal encounter.

programme.title: Secrets of the Arsenal: Heroes
programme.desc: Four stories of heroism; A golden statue for Marines shooting a battle; The medal of honor for a daring train robbery; A General's plans that led the U.S. into WWII; and a piece of paper that spells death for Bonnie and Clyde.

programme.title: Blood Feuds: Hatfields and McCoys
programme.desc: The Hatfields (Devil Anse) versus the McCoys (Randall) is one of the most notorious feuds in American history. What starts as Civil War hostility rapidly escalates to kidnapping, illicit love affairs, murder, and a nation-wide turf war.

programme.title: Blood Feuds: The Royal Gorge War
programme.desc: When Leadville, Colorado strikes silver in the 1870's, the race is on between the Atchison, Topeka & Santa Fe Railway, and the Denver & Rio Grande Railroad, to be the first to lay tracks through the narrow Royal Gorge.

programme.title: Blood Feuds: The Pleasant Valley War
programme.desc: In the dangerous frontier of Arizona, two ranching families begin as friends, but become locked in an epic battle known as the Pleasant Valley War. It's the deadliest 'family' feud in U.S. history.

programme.title: Blood Feuds: The Johnson County War
programme.desc: In 1880's Wyoming, a feud explodes when ranching homesteaders like Nate Champion face off against cattle barons like Frank Wolcott, over land, power and the future of the American West.

programme.title: Gunslingers: Tom Horn: Grim Reaper of the Rockies
programme.desc: As the Wild West becomes settled, this mysterious hit man kills for men who want to preserve the old order where violence rules all. But the law isn't giving in this time.

programme.title: Gunslingers: The Tombstone Vendetta
programme.desc: When one of the frontier's bravest men discovers the limits of the law in the most dangerous boomtown in the West, he exacts his own brand of justice on the cowboys who shot his brothers.

programme.title: Blood Feuds: The Johnson County War
programme.desc: In 1880's Wyoming, a feud explodes when ranching homesteaders like Nate Champion face off against cattle barons like Frank Wolcott, over land, power and the future of the American West.

programme.title: Gunslingers: Tom Horn: Grim Reaper of the Rockies
programme.desc: As the Wild West becomes settled, this mysterious hit man kills for men who want to preserve the old order where violence rules all. But the law isn't giving in this time.

programme.title: Gunslingers: The Tombstone Vendetta
programme.desc: When one of the frontier's bravest men discovers the limits of the law in the most dangerous boomtown in the West, he exacts his own brand of justice on the cowboys who shot his brothers.

programme.title: Blood Feuds: The Pleasant Valley War
programme.desc: In the dangerous frontier of Arizona, two ranching families begin as friends, but become locked in an epic battle known as the Pleasant Valley War. It's the deadliest 'family' feud in U.S. history.

programme.title: Blood Feuds: The Royal Gorge War
programme.desc: When Leadville, Colorado strikes silver in the 1870's, the race is on between the Atchison, Topeka & Santa Fe Railway, and the Denver & Rio Grande Railroad, to be the first to lay tracks through the narrow Royal Gorge.

programme.title: Blood Feuds: Hatfields and McCoys
programme.desc: The Hatfields (Devil Anse) versus the McCoys (Randall) is one of the most notorious feuds in American history. What starts as Civil War hostility rapidly escalates to kidnapping, illicit love affairs, murder, and a nation-wide turf war.

programme.title: Nazi Fugitives: Franz Stangl and Gustav Wagner
programme.desc: See how Nazi hunter Simon Wiesenthal tracked down fugitive war criminal Franz Stangl in Brazil. Stangl was responsible for the murder of over 800,000 people.

programme.title: Nazi Fugitives: Kurt Lishka
programme.desc: The story of German housewife Beate Klarsfeld and her husband Serge, who helped track down former Paris Gestapo chief Kurt Lishka. Lishka ordered the arrest and murder of over 33,000 Jews yet lived as a free man in Germany for years.

programme.title: Nazi Fugitives: Erich Priebke
programme.desc: A half-century after the war, American journalists track down former Gestapo officer Erich Priebke. Priebke, who was responsible for some of Italy's worst atrocities, fled to Argentina after the war.

programme.title: Nazi Fugitives: Paul Touvier
programme.desc: French investigators hunt down Paul Touvier, a pro-Nazi sympathizer who was responsible for murdering both Jews and resistance fighters. This 'Hangman of Lyon' hid himself with the assistance of a right wing group associated with the Catholic Church.

programme.title: Hitler's Empire: The Post-War Plan: America
programme.desc: In this episode we'll uncover support for the National Socialist movement within America, revealing outposts of Nazi Germany within the land of the free. We'll also learn about the man thought he believed he was the American Fuhrer.

programme.title: Hitler's Empire: The Post-War Plan: Megacities
programme.desc: In this episode we'll examine how the Nazis began to stamp their image on Germany and the nations that had fallen under the German jackboot. From plans to redesign Berlin as the capital of the world, to the destruction of Warsaw.

programme.title: Hitler's Empire: The Post-War Plan: Recreation
programme.desc: In this episode, we'll see how Hitler used the Olympic games to promote Nazism. How he controlled the leisure time and holidays of his Citizens by developing the world's largest travel agency. And how by constructing the world's biggest beach resort.

programme.title: Chasing Conspiracies: The Hollywood Syndicate
programme.desc: Examine some of the common conspiracy theories surrounding Hollywood. Suspicions about the activities of the Church of Scientology and the hacking of Sony Pictures are amongst the topics discussed.

programme.title: Chasing Conspiracies: Murder at the Vatican
programme.desc: Explore four conspiracy theories relating to the Catholic Church. See if Pope John Paul I was poisoned or if the Church knew about Nazi war criminals fleeing to South America.

programme.title: Evolution of Evil: Papa Doc: Haiti's President for Life
programme.desc: Francois Duvalier trained as a medical doctor, but his healing touch was lost as he became the ruthless dictator 'Papa Doc.' The tools of his tyranny were violence and Voodoo. He killed 30,000 people, and kept a nation in fear of his mystical powers.

programme.title: Evolution of Evil: Gaddafi: Mad Dog of the Middle East
programme.desc: The story of the world's longest serving dictator, Muammar Gaddafi, and his 42 year reign of terror at home in Libya and around the world. His actions are so increasingly insane that President Reagan dubs him The Mad Dog of the Middle East.

programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Lawn and Order: She's a Brick House
programme.desc: Poison ivy, broken windows and a cramped patio are just a few items that need to be addressed if this couple wants to turn their home into the haven it was nearly two decades ago. Chris and Sara refresh the home with a low-maintenance design.

programme.title: Paid Program
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Renovation Realities: The Thomas Job
programme.desc: Jeff and Sharon Thomas are avid DIYers, who hope to finish renovating their house by overhauling their small, outdated master bedroom. However, on the journey to creating a more open, updated space, they are confronted with one surprise after another.

programme.title: Renovation Realities: The Register Job
programme.desc: Jesse and Tenneil Register hate their unfinished basement. They are completely ready for a new family space. With lots of love and drywall, this couple is ready to take on the renovation.

programme.title: Renovation Realities: The Nordstrom Job
programme.desc: Natalie Nordstrom and Ben Bagwell are a young couple with limited DIY experience and lots of love. Their goal is to turn Natalie's poorly designed and outdated kitchen into an updated, usable space all in just five days.

programme.title: Renovation Realities: The Truka Job
programme.desc: Rob Truka and his friend Dane Fairfield try to renovate Rob's tacky, outdated kitchen. They start off strong, but as fatigue and stress start to set in, they quickly learn that renovating an older home isn't easy and can even be a hazard to your health.

programme.title: Desert Flippers: Squatters and Scorpions
programme.desc: Eric and Lindsey buy a Palm Springs property sight unseen, but once they get inside they see that it's been trashed by squatters and inhabited by scorpions. The only way to make a profit is to gut the home, adding extra dollars to their budget.

programme.title: Desert Flippers: This Mold House
programme.desc: Eric and Lindsey buy a house that's stuck in the past, but they have high hopes of bringing it into the future. Renovating outdated architecture is part of the job, but it's the unexpected disasters that make or break a flip.

programme.title: Desert Flippers: It Takes a Villa
programme.desc: Eric and Lindsey discover unlisted their Tuscan villa is missing a few ingredients. The kitchen has mysteriously been gutted, the in-ground pool is plagued with pests and the landscaping has overgrown its welcome.

programme.title: Desert Flippers: Bigger, Better, Boulder
programme.desc: A leaky pipe and rotting roof quickly add dollars to Eric and Lindsey's budget, and the flip must go on. The costs quickly climb as they try to pinch every penny, but going big on design might be the only way to squeeze a profit out of this flip.

programme.title: Desert Flippers: Little Big Flip
programme.desc: Eric and Lindsey reach for the sky as their new purchase proves that big things come in small packages. After a fire sale purchase goes up in smoke, they set their sights on a quaint condominium.

programme.title: Desert Flippers: Winning Combination
programme.desc: Things are looking up for Eric and Lindsey as they set their sights on a hilltop house. Closer inspection reveals that it will require a lot of effort to become king of the hill.

programme.title: Restored: 1905 Queen Anne Victorian Restoration
programme.desc: One of Brett's old high school friends asks him to help restore her 1905 Queen Anne Victorian bungalow. She has many unfinished renovation projects but wants to finish them. She also wants to convert a bedroom into the office it was designed to be.

programme.title: Restored: 1901 Victorian Bungalow Restoration
programme.desc: Brett restores a Victorian Bungalow for a military veteran and his daughter. The project grows in scale when unexpected problems are discovered and it becomes a complete restoration.

programme.title: Restored: 1940s Modern Ranch
programme.desc: Brett restores a 1941 modern ranch in Redlands, CA, for a couple who recently inherited the home from her grandfather.

programme.title: Restored: The Yellow Victorian Farmhouse Facelift
programme.desc: Brett restores a Victorian farmhouse with an odd floor plan. Major foundation issues complicate the project, but the happy homeowners end up with a beautiful and functional house they could never have imagined.

programme.title: Big Texas Fix: Tiny Craftsman
programme.desc: Michael and Ashley revisit a house they tried to purchase a year ago and find the small 1920s craftsman has been stripped of all its original features.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Hamming it Up
programme.desc: Today is about Roger's favorite animal - the pig. He's hamming it up with some of the country's best suppliers or cured, smoked, and aged pork.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Carolina 'Cue
programme.desc: Roger heads to North and South Carolina to visit a few restaurants to have upheld the long tradition of barbecuing. At Sweatman's in Holly Hill, whole hogs are cooked and chopped into perfection.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Fiery Mexican Feast
programme.desc: Roger meets with Chef Johnny Hernandez in San Antonio, Texas and cooks regional Mexican dishes in the ultimate outdoor kitchen.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Global Flavors of Texas
programme.desc: Today, Roger is making his way through Texas for live-fire Latin American cooking and smoked European-style sausages.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Small Packages, Big Flavors
programme.desc: Good things come in small packages, and that is especially true when it comes to artisanal food makers. Roger searches the Gulf Sates for tasty food with big flavor.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Mud and Steel in New Mexico
programme.desc: Roger heads to the heart of New Mexico where cooking with fire is taken to new culinary heights with mud and steel. Roger visits Comida de Campos in Embudo, a farm and cooking school where delicious feasts are cooked in cone-shaped clay ovens.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Ooey, Gooey and Cheesy
programme.desc: Michael Symon gets messy in New Orleans with a bacon-onion jam, brie and brioche burger.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Brisket For Breakfast
programme.desc: Michael Symon visits an old San Antonio institution given new life by their phenomenal bacon and blue cheese burger.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Smoking Meats And Summertime Eats
programme.desc: Michael Symon heads to Charleston, S.C., where he smokes a whole hog on a supersized indoor smoke pit and devours a slow-smoked rib-eye steak sandwich complete with melted cheddar and caramelized onions.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Sweet Treats and Savory Meats
programme.desc: Michael Symon starts in Boston with triple-processed pork belly that's cured, brined and smoked to meaty perfection. In Seattle, tender braised lamb shoulder amps up a traditional breakfast hash.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Florida Keys
programme.desc: Casey Webb's tasty travels take him to the Florida Keys for a bad-to-the-bone shrimp burrito and Ropa Vieja at a Cuban institution. Then he grabs a fork for the largest slice of pie he's ever seen in The Fish House's Key Lime Pie Challenge.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Manhattan
programme.desc: Casey Webb's tasty trek brings him to Manhattan for historic pizza-by-the-slice, a transcendent take on an Old World baked good and over five pounds of undefeated dessert in the Giant Ice Cream Scoop Challenge.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Philadelphia, Pa
programme.desc: Casey Webb sails to Philadelphia to tackle the epic Classic Whale Challenge, a 13-pound bagel sandwich stuffed with cream cheese, nova salmon, whitefish, tomatoes and onions.

programme.desc: Anne gets a job at Stumpy’s and goes overboard turning the diner into a Thai restaurant. After a rent increase on the food stand, Anne convinces Hop Pop to sell Plantar's Potions.

programme.title: Amphibia: A Night at the Inn/ Wally and Anne
programme.desc: The Plantars stay at an inn for a night, but Polly discovers the caretakers aren’t what they seem. Everyone calls Anne crazy when she claims to have seen the Moss Man.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Little Dipper
programme.desc: Dipper feels self-conscious that Mabel is taller than him and is becoming the alpha twin, so he seeks out a magic way to grow himself the same height. Lil' Gideon takes advantage of Dipper's and Mabel's height discrepancies.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: The Golf War
programme.desc: After being belittled by Pacifica one too many times, Mabel challenges her to a miniature golf-off which gets a tad out of control when some local residents offer their help.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: Big Roommates 2
programme.desc: Go Go and Honey Lemon quickly clash when they become roommates. Meanwhile, when a thief steals Honey Lemon’s chem-lab purse, it accidentally turns him into a monster.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: The Fate of the Roommates
programme.desc: Honey Lemon learns that she can return to her dorm, but Go Go realizes she doesn't want her to move out. The team looks to stop a secret underground racing league.

programme.title: Beyblade Burst Rise: Dante vs Delta!
Pokémon: Sun & Moon - Ultra Adventures: Got Meltan?
DuckTales: Storkules in Duckburg!
programme.desc: Louie recruits Storkules for his professional monster extermination business, while Storkules faces his greatest challenge: being Donald’s roommate.

programme.title: DuckTales: What Ever Happened to Della Duck?!
programme.desc: Marooned, Della struggles for survival against the foreign elements of the Moon.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: The Inconveniencing
programme.desc: When Dipper tries to impress Wendy by acting older than he really is, he's invited to join a group of teenagers on a trek that leads to an old abandoned convenience store that could be haunted.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: The Hand That Rocks the Mabel
programme.desc: Dipper and Mabel discover their seemingly cherubic new neighbour, Lil' Gideon, happens to be the town's adored psychic. But when Dipper convinces Mabel to go on a date with Gideon to question his authenticity, she soon learns that his cuteness can fade.

programme.title: DuckTales: Raiders of the Doomsday Vault!
programme.desc: Dewey tries to prove himself by exploring a frozen fortress in search of a Money Tree Seed, but Glomgold has kidnapped Scrooge in order to find it first.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Cricket's Place/ Volunteer Tilly
programme.desc: Follow the adventures of a boy whose curiosity and enthusiasm lead him on journeys.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Hurty Tooth / Sleepover Sisters
programme.desc: The Greens go on a family visit to the dentist's office where Cricket is determined to avoid Dr. Enamel and power through his toothache.

programme.title: Amphibia: Hop Luck / Stakeout
programme.desc: To win a village cooking contest, Anne leads the family on a quest to make pizza; Sprig tricks Anne and Hop Pop into going on a stakeout in order to make them get along.

programme.title: The Owl House: Escape of the Palisman
programme.desc: When an adventure with Eda's staff goes awry, Luz and her friends have to earn the staff back from a mysterious forest creature, or lose the staff forever.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: The Legend of the Gobblewonker
programme.desc: The twins embark on a mission to prove that a legendary sea monster exists at the bottom of the local lake. Soos helps them on a boating mission to prove it exists.

programme.title: DuckTales: Louie's Eleven!
programme.desc: Donald Duck and his nephews are reunited with Scrooge after moving into McDuck Manor.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Most Dangerous Game...Night!
programme.desc: When Louie’s quiet family game night goes wrong, the family deals with shrink rays, a secret civilization and an unhealthy competition.

programme.title: DuckTales: Storkules in Duckburg!
programme.desc: Louie recruits Storkules for his professional monster extermination business, while Storkules faces his greatest challenge: being Donald’s roommate.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Lost Harp of Mervana!
programme.desc: The family joins a zen mermaid society to find a missing mystery, but Louie is convinced the seemingly innocent mermaids have a villainous agenda of their own.

programme.title: DuckTales: From the Confidential Casefiles of Agent 22!
programme.desc: Scrooge contends with stowaway Webby during a covert operation to rescue Beakley.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Secret(s) of Castle McDuck!
programme.desc: On a family trip to Scrooge's ancestral castle, Dewey tries to hide the truth about his mom as his brothers search for family secrets.

programme.title: DuckTales: Double-O-Duck in You Only Crash Twice!
programme.desc: Donald Duck and his nephews are reunited with Scrooge after moving into McDuck Manor.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Last Crash of the Sunchaser!
programme.desc: Stuck on a precarious peak, the kids secretly search the plane for the final clue about Della's mysterious disappearance.

programme.title: DuckTales: Timephoon!
programme.desc: When Louie uses Gyro's Time Tub to steal lost treasures from the past, a mysterious storm in the present sends all of space and time crashing down onto the mansion.

programme.title: DuckTales: Challenge of the Senior Junior Woodchucks!
programme.desc: Huey races against Violet in a challenge to be named Senior Junior Woodchuck. Scrooge and the family search for a secret Woodchuck treasure.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Town Where Everyone Was Nice!
programme.desc: Donald reunites with his band, The Three Caballeros, while the family takes in the sites of a Brazilian town with a dark secret.

programme.title: DuckTales: The 87 Cent Solution!
programme.desc: The kids must stop Scrooge’s unhealthy obsession with a few missing coins to keep him from becoming the next Glomgold.

programme.title: DuckTales: Quack Pack!
programme.desc: The family is not quite themselves as they soon discover the planned family photo shoot might just be a part of a bigger 'wish' gone wrong!

programme.title: DuckTales: GlomTales!
programme.desc: Glomgold forms his own team made of all of Scrooge’s greatest villains to defeat Scrooge’s family once and for all.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: The Heart Attack
programme.desc: Sophia suffers an apparent heart attack and the girls nervously await the paramedics.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: The Custody Battle

programme.title: The Golden Girls: A Little Romance
programme.desc: Rose has been dating Dr. Jonathan Newman and begins to think their relationship is leading to the altar. However she begins to have second thoughts especially since he's a midget.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: That Was No Lady
programme.desc: Dorothy latest boyfriend, Glen, gives her a shock when he tells her he's married. She surprises herself when she finds herself sneaking around to be with him. Meanwhile, Blanche unloads her old car on Rose in order to buy a new one.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: In a Bed of Rose's

programme.title: Frasier: Star Mitzvah
programme.desc: In preparation for Frederick's Bar Mitzvah, Frasier makes a deal with a co-worker.

programme.title: Frasier: Bristle While You Work

programme.title: Frasier: Rooms With a View

programme.title: Frasier: Don't Go Breaking My Heart
programme.desc: Niles is reluctant to resume normal activities after his heart surgery.

programme.title: Frasier: We Two Kings
programme.desc: With Christmas only days away, Frasier is deep in preparation for this year's celebration.

programme.title: Frasier: Door Jam
programme.desc: A chance invitation to Seattle's premier spa offers Frasier and Niles a taste of heaven.

programme.title: Frasier: The Harassed
programme.desc: Frasier is forced to share his desk and show with the station's new finance reporter.

programme.title: Frasier: Lilith Needs a Favor
programme.desc: Making an impromptu visit to Seattle, Lilith drops a bombshell on an unsuspecting Frasier.

programme.title: I Love Lucy: Lucy Meets the Queen
programme.desc: Lucy won't give up at finding an opportunity to meet the Queen and the Royal family.

programme.title: I Love Lucy: The Fox Hunt

programme.title: I Love Lucy: Lucy Goes to Scotland
programme.desc: Ricky's European tour calls for Paris, but Lucy wants to look for relatives in Scotland.

programme.title: I Love Lucy: Paris at Last
programme.desc: Lucy plans to uncover Parisian artistic talent and meets a con artist.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: The Truth Will Out
programme.desc: Rose is apprehensive about a visit from her daughter and granddaughter, since their reason for coming is to settle Rose's late-husband's will. Meanwhile, Blanche gets caught up in the tabloids of a society murder.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Nice and Easy
programme.desc: Blanche's visiting niece is a chip right off the old block when she dates a different man all night every night. Dorothy does battle with a mouse living in the house.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: The Operation
programme.desc: Dorothy is hesitant about having foot surgery just as she was scheduled to tap dance with Blanche and Rose at a dance recital.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Second Motherhood
programme.desc: Blanche is romanced by a wealthy suitor who she learns has several small children. This fact dampens his proposal of marriage. Meanwhile, Dorothy and Rose go to bat with the bathroom plumbing.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Adult Education
programme.desc: Blanche's psychology professor sexually harasses her when she goes to him for help on a difficult test. Blanche's professor makes her a harassing deal: If she has sex with him, he'll give her an 'A' for the exam.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Job Hunting
programme.desc: When Rose loses her job at the grief center, she begins searching for other sources of work. Meanwhile, Blanche tries to lose a few pounds and Dorothy is excited when a man she once had a crush on asks her out.

programme.title: Home and Family

programme.title: Movie: In the Key of Love

programme.title: Movie: Dater's Handbook
programme.desc: A woman changes her personality according to a dating guide book to find a husband, but realizes the man she wants is the one who loves her for who she is.

programme.title: Movie: All of My Heart: Inn Love

programme.desc: When a woman dies after a long illness, investigators have to determine if her death was due to natural causes, suicide, or murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sphere of Influence
programme.desc: After a young girl disappears from a small town in a remote area of Alaska, police wonder if she'd been attacked by a bear or become lost in the woods. After her body is discovered with two gunshot wounds they realize the truth is much darker.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Nailed
programme.desc: Just before she's scheduled to testify against her alleged rapist, a woman is murdered on her front lawn. 15 years later, investigators used new technology to finally catch the woman's killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Soiled Plan

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Uncovered: Viking Secrets
programme.desc: Josh Gates investigates how a group of Norse tribesman gained power in medieval Europe.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Uncovered: Vikings In America
programme.desc: Josh Gates traces the Vikings' westward expansion to find out if they landed in the United States.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown

programme.title: Legends of the Wild: The Shadow Killer
programme.desc: An investigation into whether a long-extinct predator is responsible for kangaroos being mauled.

programme.desc: From an abandoned American dream in the dense Amazon jungle, to an abbey in France where countless souls lost their lives, Josh ventures to five legendary locations where man has battled the forces of nature.

programme.desc: Joe and Cody face unpredictable and punishing tropical storms and brave shark-infested waters.

programme.title: Dual Survival: Rocky Mountain High
programme.desc: Cody and Joe battle temperatures of negative twenty degrees Fahrenheit in a fight to stay alive.

programme.title: Dual Survival: Misty Mountain Drop

programme.title: Dual Survival: No End in Sight

programme.title: Naked and Afraid XL: Surviving With Sharks
programme.desc: With resources dwindling, the survivalists venture into the shark-infested waters of the South China Sea searching for a much-needed meal.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid XL: Lightning on the Open Seas'
programme.desc: Depleted by their sixty-day challenge, Jeff and Laura fish the South China Sea, but are caught in a dangerous electrical storm on open water. The brutal conditions on land and sea lead to the Philippines claiming its first victim.

programme.title: Friends: The One With the Thumb

programme.title: Friends: The One With George Stephanopoulos

programme.title: Friends: The One With the East German Laundry Detergent

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Tipping Point
programme.desc: Sal, Murr, Joe and Q pull desk duty, and then do strangers a solid by barring them from the bathroom. Plus, the big loser learns the hard way that gratuity is not included.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Off the Reservation
programme.desc: Murr, Q, Joe and Sal participate in a fake documentary, then find themselves in the middle of a marshmallow throwing contest. Plus, tonight's big loser is the host with the least when he can't find customers' dinner reservations.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Well...
programme.desc: Q, Sal, Joe and Murr play a game of tag at a coffee shop, then convince shoppers to deliver sketchy messages at the grocery store. Plus, tonight's big loser might lose his mind in Impractical Jokers' first-ever non-punishment punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Bad Carma
programme.desc: Murr, Sal, Joe and Q showcase questionable products to participants, and then rescue strangers who don't need to be rescued. Later, the big loser must hit and run his mouth to get himself out of trouble.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Fast Feud

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Toll Booth Corrector
programme.desc: The guys pose as suspicious nutritionists trying to recruit clients, before quitting their jobs for strange reasons. Afterwards, the gang goes head-to-head in a wild debate judged by a stranger.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Urine Trouble
programme.desc: The guys play receptionists looking for suspicious names. The guys seek marriage advice from strangers after a private eye shares incriminating photos. The big loser goes from pissed off to pissed on in the matter of one punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Fraudway
programme.desc: Q, Joe, Sal and Murr one-up each other while trying not to laugh, and team up for a lunch that’s for the birds. Later, tonight’s big loser hits the Broadway stage, where he’s treated to a classic New York welcome by an agitated crowd.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Turning the Tables

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: No Child Left Behind
programme.desc: Find out how you make a 'Grandpa Whoopsie' doll, why winter is the perfect season to play pin for the win and where the idea for Q's dirty diaper challenge came from.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Pulling the Rug
programme.desc: Find out where Joe originally wanted to play hide n' seek, what Q's favourite dessert is, and what the crew was most afraid of during Murr's wig-pulling punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Speech Impediment
programme.desc: Go behind the scenes to find out what singer Q is obsessed with, what Sal's secret ingredient to fake vomit is, and why the Jokers in Yonkers had to muffle their laughter.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Eat Pray Fight

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Pet Peeve

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Unhappy Camper

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Christmas Chaos

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Heavy Meddle

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Treachery

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Aftershock

programme.title: North Woods Law: Star Spangled Weekend

programme.title: North Woods Law: Bait and Switch

programme.title: North Woods Law: Hunting Season
programme.desc: In this special episode, Officer Glen Lucas and his fellow conservation officers look back at the most epic hunting cases of their careers and the tactics they used to get the truth from poachers desperately trying to cover their tracks.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Breaking and Entering
programme.desc: Officer Lucas attempts to track down trespassers who tore up land owned by Fish and Game. On Mt. Mousilauke, Officer Towne races to assist an injured 11-year-old hiker and Officer Courtney confronts a group of fishermen about an illegal catch.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Coastal Criminals
programme.desc: Officer James Benvenuti chases down two lobster poachers in Rye. In a puzzling case, Officer Graham Courtney investigates a man on the beach found covered in blood. And Sergeant Adam Cheney attempts to apprehend trespassers on the railroad tracks.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Collision Course
programme.desc: Lt. Boudreau and Officer Hannett track a hunter at an illegal bait site. Officers Towne, Matson and Jones investigate a teenage hunter with a changing story. And a routine patrol in icy conditions becomes a life-changing event for Officer Lucas.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Out of Control
programme.desc: Officers Boudreau and Hannett pursue a pair of intoxicated, out of control, teenage dirt bikers. Officer Bronson investigates a night-hunting case involving an animal he's never dealt with. And Officer Lucas gets creative trying to rescue a baby bird.

programme.title: North Woods Law: High Jinks
programme.desc: The wardens battle illegal marijuana across the state. It is dangerous work that often sees armed individuals protecting their land. Three teens are involved in an ATV crash that has the wardens stumped.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Uncuffed 2
programme.desc: A look back at the most exciting moments and never-before-seen stories.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Outfoxed

programme.title: North Woods Law: Night and Day
programme.desc: The wardens work around the clock to handle turkey hunting season and smelt runs. A search warrant is needed upon the discovery of poached turkeys. The wardens come across many animals including orphaned baby foxes, nuisance beavers and a python.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Spooning Paul Revere

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Mile High Club

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Cool as Ike
programme.desc: The Pawn Stars prepare to invade when Rick is offered a memoir written and signed by Dwight D. Eisenhower.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Lord of the Ring

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Extreme Pawnover
programme.desc: Chumlee checks out a one-of-a-kind Ford Model A dubbed the 'Hellbilly.' Complete with flamethrowers and a skull stick shift, will he burn a hole in Rick's pocket to score this custom car?

programme.title: Pawn Stars: McKinley Family Jewels
programme.desc: Rick falls in love with a tiara that belonged to the wife of President McKinley. A Felix the Cat sparkler toy pounces into the shop. Everyone loses their patience when Rick receives a secret package.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: You Snooze, You Lose
programme.desc: Rick checks out a German two-handed sword that was built in the early 1600s. Then, a set of 1933 baseball cards are brought into the shop. Later, Corey's new neighbours are keeping him up at night.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Pawn Creature
programme.desc: Catch the Pawn Stars as they come face-to-face with a life-size Creature from the Black Lagoon. Then, Rick gets the inside scoop with a handwritten love letter from Judy Garland to Frank Sinatra. Also, Chum and Corey try to scare Rick at the shop.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Pawn Halen
programme.desc: A set of 1814 naval history books from John Adam's personal library sails into the shop. An electronic cigar box guitar signed by the legendary frontman Sammy Hager rocks in. Then, a 1901 coin sorter comes into the shop.

programme.desc: A Nepalese Bira gun from the late 1800s, a 1970s Bob Peak TWA mural, a three-trumpet brass horn.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Thar She Pawns

programme.title: Pawn Stars: A Pawn of Lies
programme.desc: Two original lithographs by graphic artist M.C. Escher; a censored recording made on a Soviet X-ray; a Wells Fargo model stagecoach; a 1950s toy lie detector.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Dark Valley
programme.desc: Gavin Smith was dashing. When he vanished, LA detectives were unsure if they were investigating a crime or a suicide. His wife said he'd gotten lost in drugs and flings. Police wondered if the key to finding Gavin was hidden in one of those affairs.

programme.desc: A beautiful, popular graduate student is shot dead outside her apartment in Durham, North Carolina.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Secrets on Hot Springs Drive
programme.desc: A woman is murdered in a home invasion. Then, her best friend and neighbor is shot the following night. Investigators unearth disturbing secrets that suggest the cases may be linked.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Deadly Desire
programme.desc: They were two beautiful families living out their dreams, but gunshots in a parking lot revealed an ugly truth. Investigators uncovered three lives tangled in a love triangle. There were many secrets, but which one was the key to solving the mystery?

programme.desc: The murder of a man inside his suburban Los Angeles home sets off a chain reaction of murder, conspiracy and furious cover-ups.

programme.title: It Takes a Killer: Blood Thicker Than Marriage
programme.desc: Cops investigate the apparent carjacking of a husband and wife in Los Angeles, only to discover that the ambush was ruse, carried out by cousins, to kill the husband for insurance money.

programme.title: It Takes a Killer: Too Late to Say Sorry
programme.desc: A triple homicide in small town Maine rocks a community and destroys a family. It doesn't take police long to piece together the elements of the crime and its ruthless cover-up which point back to a perpetrator close to home.

programme.title: It Takes a Killer: The Clear Lake Murders
programme.desc: Four young adults are gunned down inside an affluent home in a quiet suburb of Houston, Texas. Police investigate the homicide for three years, chasing down hundreds of leads, before arriving at a cold-blooded-killer with a convoluted motive.

programme.title: It Takes a Killer: Cheat, Kill, Denny
programme.desc: A central California community is rocked when a pregnant wife vanishes without a trace on Christmas Eve. After months of tireless investigation and conversations with an informant, cops make two grisly discoveries.

programme.title: It Takes a Killer: Down in Flames
programme.desc: The discovery of a burned body on the side of the road in suburban Dallas, Texas kicks starts a furious race to find a killer.

programme.title: Accident, Suicide, or Murder: Killer Crash
programme.desc: A terrifying crash off a mountain road leaves one woman dead and her husband injured. But the fatal accident raises suspicions as a family fights to expose the real story.

programme.title: Accident, Suicide, or Murder: Deadly Prophecy
programme.desc: A young pastor grieves after his wife dies in a house fire. Shocking secrets are revealed, the community is then shattered. A prophecy could have predicted her death.

programme.title: Accident, Suicide, or Murder: Finger on the Trigger

programme.title: Accident, Suicide, or Murder: Investigated By Paul Holes: What Happened to Morgan Ingram?

programme.title: Snapped: Anne Throneberry

programme.title: Snapped: Uloma Curry-Walker

programme.title: Snapped: Alisha Noel-Murray
programme.desc: After a man is shot just a few feet inside his New York home, the ensuing investigation brings to light a murder-for-hire plot spurred by greed.

programme.title: Movie: World War Z

programme.title: Wild Uganda
programme.desc: Uganda boasts one of the most diverse landscapes on Earth and wildlife is thriving.

programme.title: The Nile: Paradise Found
programme.desc: The waters of the Nile come from distant lands: the rugged mountains of Ethiopia, springs in the rainforest and Lake Victoria. The Nile has many sources and the journey through them reveals colourful, fascinating creatures along the way.

programme.title: The Nile: Heart of Darkness
programme.desc: Learn about the amazing variety of species on the banks of the Nile, including an aerial view of the never-before-filmed great antelope migration of South Sudan.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: Bugged Bunny
