programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: Money Barks
programme.desc: The animals of Isabella County are getting antsy after such a long winter and they’re up to more trouble than usual.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: Slop, Drop and Pol
programme.desc: Dr. Pol certainly has a lot on his plate when a pit-bull is in for emergency surgery, a pair of pups run into a prickly porcupine, and Smoke the pet pig is attacked.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: It's Raining Hen
programme.desc: Popeye the therapy rabbit comes into Pol Clinic with overgrown teeth but leaves with a couple of dates when his owner, Jodi, persuades Dr. Pol to donate dinner with himself and Diane for a fundraiser.

programme.title: Monster Fish: 600lb Goldfish
programme.desc: An investigation into giant carp, which can only be found in three of Southeast Asia's rivers.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: America's Loch Ness Monster
programme.desc: A strange creature like the Loch Ness Monster is recorded in America. Experts analyze evidence of a giant scaly egg, and some wonder if it belongs to a dragon. Birds are suddenly vaporized by an invisible death ray.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Return of the Ice Monster
programme.desc: A giant creature in an armor of ice is spotted in the Alaskan wild, and some suspect it's a deadly mythical monster. A jet has a close encounter with an unknown object. Evidence of a deadly lightning strike invites paranormal explanations.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: The Incident at Area 51
programme.desc: Near Area 51, a police convoy is filmed transporting an alien-looking craft in the dead of night. When strange beams of light are reported in Argentina, experts investigate if it's proof of a terrifying Nazi superweapon.

programme.title: How It's Made: One Tough Knife
programme.desc: Hi-tech friction knives are expertly crafted to maintain their sharp edges to hunt, and the process to make them requires the cutting-edge technology and sophisticated engineering.

programme.title: Mega Machines: Secrets of the Race Car
programme.desc: The Mahindra M6Electro is a cutting-edge race car on a mission to become the Formula E champion, and special access under the hood reveals how this speed demon can reach 170 mph with a futuristic mega-battery straight out of science fiction.

programme.title: Mega Machines: Sea Monsters: Doomsday Flood Fortress
programme.desc: The Netherlands is home to the most advanced water defense system on the planet, protecting millions with hi-tech, fortress-like barriers; engineers show how this sophisticated water control network works as it faces its greatest challenge yet.

programme.title: Engineering Catastrophes: Highway to Hell
programme.desc: Investigating a skyscraper raining deadly bolts on the streets below, a highway on the brink of collapse, and a catastrophic landslide.

programme.title: Mega Machines: Secrets of the Race Car
programme.desc: The Mahindra M6Electro is a cutting-edge race car on a mission to become the Formula E champion, and special access under the hood reveals how this speed demon can reach 170 mph with a futuristic mega-battery straight out of science fiction.

programme.title: Mega Machines: Sea Monsters: Doomsday Flood Fortress
programme.desc: The Netherlands is home to the most advanced water defense system on the planet, protecting millions with hi-tech, fortress-like barriers; engineers show how this sophisticated water control network works as it faces its greatest challenge yet.

programme.title: Engineering Catastrophes: Highway to Hell
programme.desc: Investigating a skyscraper raining deadly bolts on the streets below, a highway on the brink of collapse, and a catastrophic landslide.

programme.title: How It's Made: One Tough Knife
programme.desc: Hi-tech friction knives are expertly crafted to maintain their sharp edges to hunt, and the process to make them requires the cutting-edge technology and sophisticated engineering.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Missing: Ghost Ship of the Desert
programme.desc: After a huge cargo ship suddenly vanishes with 27 crew members on board, new evidence suggests the culprit may be a mythical rogue wave. Plus, recently discovered evidence may prove the existence of a ghost ship in the Californian desert.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Missing: The Men Who Beat Alcatraz
programme.desc: In 1962, three convicts attempt the impossible and escape from Alcatraz prison. Officials believe the men drowned, but a new scientific experiment suggests they made it to shore.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Missing: Hunt for Flight MH370
programme.desc: Since 2014, the fate of Malaysia Airlines flight MH370 has remained a mystery. It's still unclear if it crashed, and if it did, the wreckage has yet to be found.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Missing: Curse of the Bermuda Triangle
programme.desc: After five planes vanish in the Bermuda Triangle, new science suggests a strange geological force is responsible. Today, satellites are revealing lost tribes living in the Amazon jungle, but some civilizations remain missing, stumping experts.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Missing: Forbidden City of Gold
programme.desc: New technology reveals lost cities in inhospitable jungle, and researchers wonder if the mythical city of El Dorado could be the next discovery. After a crystal is found on a shipwreck, experts believe it could prove how the Vikings discovered America.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Missing: Lost Colony of Roanoke
programme.desc: The Roanoke colony vanished without a trace, and centuries later, it remains one of history's greatest unsolved mysteries. But new evidence might at last reveal its fate. After a man is swallowed by the earth, experts wonder if a sinkhole is to blame.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Missing: Atlantis: The Lost Evidence
programme.desc: Atlantis is one of the most famous disappearances of all time. After thousands of years, state-of-the-art technology might finally be able to crack this ancient mystery. And after nine hikers die in a gruesome cold case, new science provides a hot lead.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Missing: Flight of Terror
programme.desc: In 2009, an Air France flight going missing and investigators discover this tragedy could happen again. After a huge area of Siberian forest is destroyed, investigators race to find the culprit. New evidence might finally solve this century-old mystery.

programme.title: Unexplained and Unexplored: Egypt's Land of the Gods
programme.desc: New evidence from one of the world's oldest maps offers clues to a long-lost civilization of untold treasure, and this cutting-edge expedition might finally prove that this mysterious kingdom is the ancestral home of the ancient Egyptians.

programme.title: Unexplained and Unexplored: Curse of Superstition Mountains
programme.desc: New discoveries at the site of an alleged long-lost gold mine could lead investigators to a 200-million-dollar payday, and using cutting-edge tech, experts investigate clues in long-lost maps and relics to recover the Lost Dutchman's treasure.

programme.title: Unexplained and Unexplored: Finding the Fountain of Youth
programme.desc: The legend of the Fountain of Youth might finally be explained by hidden messages encoded in a 500-year-old map, and using cutting-edge archaeological methods, experts explore forgotten caves and perilous waters to reveal this mystery's long-lost secrets.

programme.title: Unexplained and Unexplored: Ghost Ship of the Damned
programme.desc: A long-lost treasure map claims to know the whereabouts of a missing ship buried with gold and silver in the California desert, and using cutting-edge technology, a team of experts use this new evidence to get close to a game-changing discovery.

programme.title: Unexplained and Unexplored: Mystery of the American Maya
programme.desc: New evidence suggests the Maya civilization did not suddenly vanish, but that they instead still survived, they just resettled in the United States. Using cutting-edge tech, experts reveal what really happened to these long-lost people.

programme.title: See No Evil: Random Sighting
programme.desc: Tosha Lampkin is in Shreveport, Louisiana visiting family. After a late-night trip for food, Tosha disappears. Her burnt out rental car is discovered... along with Tosha's remains. CCTV cameras provide detectives with their only lead on her killers.

programme.title: See No Evil: Breakdown at Daylight
programme.desc: 17-year old Casey Crowder vanished early one Sunday morning after her car ran out of gas outside of Dumas, Arkansas. With no leads and no witnesses, investigators are desperate to find any CCTV cameras that can lead them to the missing teen.

programme.title: See No Evil: A Date with Dalene
programme.desc: On August 6th 2011, Dalene Carlson vanishes during a Saturday night on the town. Security footage from a local bar reveals a number of potential suspects, each with a motive.

programme.title: See No Evil: Seeking Out Maple
programme.desc: In the early hours of September 28th, 2011, student Maple Batalia is found shot dead in the parking lot of Simon Fraser University.

programme.title: See No Evil: Where's Mom?
programme.desc: Shirley Shell is a loving wife and the dedicated mother of three children and two grandchildren. But on June 3rd, 2007, Shirley is found brutally murdered at home in Edmond, Oklahoma. The rush is on to search security footage to help hunt down the killer.

programme.title: Deadly Recall: Cris-Cross
programme.desc: In 2004, Detective Postiglione investigates the rare double homicide of two young college students in an apartment near a Nashville university. When a third victim is gunned down, a state-wide manhunt in launched to find the killer.

programme.title: See No Evil: Run for the Door
programme.desc: Documenting how surveillance cameras assist with solving crime in America.

programme.title: See No Evil: Where's Mom?
programme.desc: Shirley Shell is a loving wife and the dedicated mother of three children and two grandchildren. But on June 3rd, 2007, Shirley is found brutally murdered at home in Edmond, Oklahoma. The rush is on to search security footage to help hunt down the killer.

programme.title: Deadly Recall: Cris-Cross
programme.desc: In 2004, Detective Postiglione investigates the rare double homicide of two young college students in an apartment near a Nashville university. When a third victim is gunned down, a state-wide manhunt in launched to find the killer.

programme.title: See No Evil: Breakdown at Daylight
programme.desc: 17-year old Casey Crowder vanished early one Sunday morning after her car ran out of gas outside of Dumas, Arkansas. With no leads and no witnesses, investigators are desperate to find any CCTV cameras that can lead them to the missing teen.

programme.title: See No Evil: A Date with Dalene
programme.desc: On August 6th 2011, Dalene Carlson vanishes during a Saturday night on the town. Security footage from a local bar reveals a number of potential suspects, each with a motive.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: She Made me Do It
programme.desc: As a boy, Eric Witte's father taught him to protect his family. But as his father grows increasingly violent, Eric realizes that he is the evil his family needs protection from.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: Trapped in Hell
programme.desc: Lindsay Wrinkles always knew that her father had a short temper, but she never expected to be on the run from him when she was only 14. As she runs from hideout to hideout desperate to evade him, Lindsay wonders what will happen if he ever finds her.

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor: Not in My Yard
programme.desc: A rash of break-ins shatters the peace in a tight community, and when residents take sides along the fault lines; good friends turn into deadly enemies.

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor: There's No Place Like Hell
programme.desc: Two neighboring Omaha mothers turn from friends to foes in a vicious spat, which ends with both their homes burned to the ground. But could a woman really burn down a house with innocent children sleeping inside? A wiretap reveals the real arsonist.

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor: Bonfire of Blood
programme.desc: An argument about access to a disputed road puts two Lompico, California men at each other's throats. Things progress from intimidation and property damage to a backhoe attack and, finally, one of the most shocking murders the area has ever seen.

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor: Desperate Times, Deadly Measures
programme.desc: An Appalachian couple is delighted when their neighbors return home after mysteriously disappearing for ten years. But they've changed, for the worse, unleashing a campaign of endless intimidation and harassment that ultimately ends in a bloodbath.

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor: Mountain of Madness
programme.desc: A wealthy executive comes into conflict with his neighbors when he forbids them access to his extensive lands. One local handyman fights to keep the roads and trails open for all, a struggle that ends when one man lies dead.

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor: Dead Men Tell No Tales
programme.desc: A man who is meticulous about his lawn runs into conflict with a new neighbour who doesn't have the same priorities. The feud between the two men viciously escalates, ultimately ending in an episode of shocking violence.

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor: Hell Hounds
programme.desc: A woman in Dayton, Ohio welcomes a young family when they move into the long derelict house next door. But escalating fights over everything from treatment of pets to treatment of children leads to a violent, bloody, and deadly confrontation.

programme.title: The Killer Beside Me: Roadside Murder
programme.desc: Theresa Wesolowski was murdered on May 29, 1999, leaving police baffled for nearly 10 years. They finally got a break in the case when a new DNA technique identified a co-worker, Mark Libecki, who was convicted of 1st degree murder in 2009.

programme.title: The Killer Beside Me: Deadly Business
programme.desc: Robert Henry, an exec in Tacoma, was murdered in 1995 by a masked gunman. His wife tells the Police she thought he was killed by a former business associate. Det. Yerbury investigated and pieced together the evidence that convicted Larry Shandola.

programme.title: The Killer Beside Me: Almost Home
programme.desc: Gayle Isleib was shot on April 30, 1996. Police identify a co-worker, Tyronne Montgomery. Evidence is found of stalking, plans to kidnap Gayle, murder her husband and love poems to Gayle. Tyrone Montgomery was convicted of 1st degree Murder.

programme.title: The Killer Beside Me: Living a Lie
programme.desc: Bob Peterson invites himself to his co-workers Gene and Jaye-Jaye Thurnau's new home to give them a housewarming present. That evening, Jaye-Jaye leaves the guys to run an errand.

programme.title: Evolution of Evil: Stalin: Russia's Steel Tyrant
programme.desc: For 30 years, Joseph Stalin rules the Soviet Union with an iron fist. Anyone who stands in his way will be destroyed.

programme.title: Hitler's Messiah Complex
programme.desc: Discover how a series of psychotic episodes in his early life convinced Adolf Hitler that he was a modern day Pharaoh.

programme.title: Hitler's Death Ray
programme.desc: 5,100 miles from the Earth a solar death ray can be found orbiting the skies. At the thrust of rocket, this solar mirror will obliterate any city. This was the Nazi dream, see the reality.

programme.title: Hitler and the Aryan Myth
programme.desc: A laughable pseudo-history dreamt up by occult fantasists lay behind the myth of the Aryan super race. Yet it inspired the Nazis into war, legitimized the holocaust and led to the abduction of tens of thousands of young Aryan-looking children.

programme.title: High Hitler and His Nazi Supersoldiers
programme.desc: Newly discovered secret files reveal the huge drugs program that fuelled the Nazi war machine. Led by Hitler, himself possessed by narcotics, the German troops consume tens of millions of Crystal Meth tablets throughout the war, driving them to extremes.

programme.title: Nazi Jihad
programme.desc: As Allied forces close in on Germany, the Nazi dream looks to be over. However, two men will carry Hitler's vision beyond Germany: Otto Skorzeny and Amin Al Husseini. From their Nazi stronghold in the Middle East, these men create a new kind of terror.

programme.title: Mad Science: Nazi Killer Bugs
programme.desc: Hitler famously said he was against biological weapons, but new evidence shows the Nazis were colluding with experts on germ warfare. They had a deadly plan to launch a disease attack on the Allies that could have even changed the course of the war.

programme.title: High Hitler and His Nazi Supersoldiers
programme.desc: Newly discovered secret files reveal the huge drugs program that fuelled the Nazi war machine. Led by Hitler, himself possessed by narcotics, the German troops consume tens of millions of Crystal Meth tablets throughout the war, driving them to extremes.

programme.title: Hitler and the Aryan Myth

programme.title: Hitler's Death Ray
programme.desc: 5,100 miles from the Earth a solar death ray can be found orbiting the skies. At the thrust of rocket, this solar mirror will obliterate any city. This was the Nazi dream, see the reality.

programme.title: Hitler's Messiah Complex
programme.desc: Discover how a series of psychotic episodes in his early life convinced Adolf Hitler that he was a modern day Pharaoh.

programme.title: Apocalypse: Hitler: The Menace
programme.desc: See how Hitler succeeded in conquering Germany. Nothing predestines this mediocre student and failed artist to become dictator of Germany the Führer.

programme.title: Apocalypse: Hitler: The Fuhrer
programme.desc: 1929. Germany, harshly affected by the worldwide economic crisis, is sinking into despair. Bloody street fighting between Nazis and Communists is raging. Fear of the 'Red peril' will push millions of voters into Hitler's arms. Democracy is at risk.

programme.title: Hitler's Empire: The Post-War Plan: Hitler's British Head Quarters
programme.desc: Guy looks at the Nazi plans for Britain. From pre-war spying, concentration camps on British soil to national landmarks earmarked by Hitler for his own use.

programme.title: Hitler's Empire: The Post-War Plan: Nazification
programme.desc: A look at how Hitler implemented changes through anti-Semitic clothing laws, the establishing of SS bride schools and breeding programmes that saw children stolen from their parents.

programme.title: Hitler's Empire: The Post-War Plan: Transporting the Reich
programme.desc: At look at how Hitler's redesign of the German transport system was a key factor in his preparations for war, including how he used the car industry for the rearmament of his military and see his plans for a colossal rail system.

programme.title: Gunslingers: The Tombstone Vendetta
programme.desc: When one of the frontier's bravest men discovers the limits of the law in the most dangerous boomtown in the West, he exacts his own brand of justice on the cowboys who shot his brothers.

programme.title: Gunslingers: Butch Cassidy: The Perfect Criminal
programme.desc: Until the day he died, whenever that was, nobody ever outsmarted Butch Cassidy. He always got away. Cassidy was an outlaw who lived more by his wits than by his gun.

programme.title: Chasing Conspiracies: The Lockerbie Plot
programme.desc: An inquiry into whether Iran was really behind the Lockerbie Bombing, if the CIA invented and promoted suicide bombing in the Middle East, why there were no photos of Bin Laden's body and if 9/11 was actually an inside job.

programme.title: Chasing Conspiracies: Cold War in Space
programme.desc: July 21st, 1969 saw one of the iconic events of the 20th century when the Apollo 10 crew set foot on the moon. However, some claim the moon landings were faked. A hacker claims to have found evidence of a U.S. space fleet fueled by alien technology.

programme.title: Chasing Conspiracies: Sex, Drugs and Rock 'n' Roll
programme.desc: A look at some of the conspiracies surrounding iconic bands such as Led Zeppelin, The Sex Pistols and The Doors.

programme.title: Chasing Conspiracies: The Pearl Harbor Cover Up
programme.desc: History says that this was the ultimate sneak attack, but conspiracists are convinced that the U.S. President knew it was coming and decided to sacrifice their own troops to give the country an excuse to join the war against Germany.

programme.title: Big Texas Fix: Run Down Family Rental
programme.desc: Ashley and Michael take on a rundown, family-owned 1939 craftsman. The project is an emotional journey for the duo as the bland home is transformed into a breath-taking abode with room expansions and some inspired flooring choices.

programme.title: Big Texas Fix: Fire Salvaged Victorian
programme.desc: Ashley and Michael see hidden potential in a fire-damaged Victorian and decide to save it from demolition. They open up the cramped space by turning a breezeway into a kitchen and repurpose an old safe.

programme.title: Big Texas Fix: The Kettle House
programme.desc: Michael and Ashley get the opportunity to renovate a bizarre Galveston icon that may harbor a few surprises inside. The spaceship-shaped landmark is soon brimming with life as the Cordrays bring their unique charm to the one-of-a-kind house.

programme.title: Holmes: Buy It Right: Holmes Views St. Anthony Homes
programme.desc: In St. Anthony, Minnesota, Rhonda and Leo Bogee are looking for a home that's both within their budget and perfect for their four-member family. Mike goes through houses pointing out the pros and cons for each teaching them how to buy with confidence.

programme.title: Holmes: Buy It Right: Newlyweds Need Help in Florida
programme.desc: Robyn and Anthony are newly married, first-time homebuyers that are moving out of their apartment and the pressure is on to find a home. They're interested in a move-in ready income property or a low-priced home that needs some work.

programme.title: Holmes: Buy It Right: Trio Hunts for Home in Aurora
programme.desc: In Aurora, Colorado, Mike lends a hand to newlyweds Ambera and Clayton.

programme.title: Holmes: Buy It Right: On a Mission in St. Petersburg
programme.desc: Mike heads to St. Petersburg, Florida, to help first-time homebuyers Heather and Jay. Along with Heather's young son, the couple plans to move into the best house they can find within their budget.

programme.title: Holmes: Buy It Right: Eyeing First Home in Englewood
programme.desc: Newlyweds Andie and Pete are ready to buy their first home in Englewood, Colorado. Mike steps in and tours their chosen homes and shows the couple what's worth a good bid and what's worth walking away from.

programme.title: Holmes: Buy It Right: Off the Ranch in Colorado
programme.desc: After choosing possible houses in the Denver region, newlyweds Jennifer and Matt tour the structures with Mike, who shows them how to tell whether a home is a good buy or if it's a house that deserves a "goodbye".

programme.title: Holmes: Buy It Right: Hilton Head House Hunt
programme.desc: Mike Holmes travels to the beautiful island of Hilton Head, South Carolina, to advise first time homebuyers Caroline and Diego Mahecha during their search for the perfect family home. Mike goes through the houses and identifies issues.

programme.title: Holmes: Buy It Right: No Ordinary Buy in Minneapolis

programme.title: Yardcore: Eclectic Entertainers Paradise
programme.desc: Jake and Joel Moss upgrade a blank space backyard into an entertainer's paradise. A massive fireplace made from a reclaimed diesel gas drum and concrete warms things up with seating on either side.

programme.title: Paid Program
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Containables: Deadlines and Due Dates
programme.desc: Jon and Kristen design a three-container structure in the Smoky Mountains of North Carolina. Dealing with tricky terrain and inclement mountain weather, the team enlists their families' help to install bowling alley wood countertops, patio doors and more.

programme.title: Containables: Containers of Staggering Size
programme.desc: Jon and Kristen want to change the way people think about container living and start by tackling their biggest build yet. They stagger two 40-foot containers and open the walls between them to create a massive great room.

programme.title: Containables: Hurricanes and Golf Balls
programme.desc: Jon and Kristen design and build a container home for a local couple's adopted son and fill it with fun features like a lofted bed, hydraulic TV winch and an outdoor fire pit. A second container has a custom workshop and a rooftop driving range.

programme.title: Containables: A Great Room With Great Views
programme.desc: Jon and Kristen raise the bar by taking on their biggest container home yet for a homeowner who wants a home where her entire family can bunk down and enjoy the amazing views her property affords.

programme.title: Containables: Stacking the Decks to a T
programme.desc: Jon and Kristen are eager to begin work on a very special container home that combines a unique design with the scenic beauty of South Texas. The home consists of three containers stacked to create a cantilevered look with multi-level decks.

programme.title: Containables: Container Home Away From Home
programme.desc: Jon and Kristen work to build a container home for the in-laws when they come to visit their new grandson. With only four weeks to complete the project, the couple must must tackle 20-foot and 40-foot containers.

programme.title: Behind the Build: HGTV Smart Home
programme.desc: Tiffany Brooks and Jason Pickens offer a behind-the-build tour of HGTV Smart Home 2020 in the leafy suburb of Wexford, Pennsylvania. See how this design-build duo collaborates on the high-tech Craftsman home with industrial touches and a modern flair.

programme.title: Tiny Paradise: Tiny Costa Rican Casa
programme.desc: A Denver couple leaves the big city for their vacation spot in Arenal, Costa Rica. They design an unbelievably sustainable tiny home surrounded by the natural beauty of this small Central American town.

programme.title: Tiny Paradise: Tiny Newlywed Nest
programme.desc: Newlyweds start off their new life together minimally and cost-effectively by going tiny in Salmon, ID.

programme.title: Tiny Paradise: Tiny Lakeside Getaway
programme.desc: A young couple in Lakeside, Montana, is downsizing to a tiny cabin in the woods. Set against a gorgeous backdrop, this cozy A-frame cabin offers a skylight for stargazing, a suspended hammock bed, a stone fireplace and hidden art storage.

programme.title: Tiny Paradise: Tiny Island Escape
programme.desc: A family has found a slice of paradise on a small island in the Bahamas and is ready to start building their dream home. Although this location has a harsh landscape and the threat of hurricanes, they build a cliff-side shack overlooking the ocean.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Sliding Into Paradise
programme.desc: A young Tennessee family's steep backyard has made it impossible to enjoy. Kyle and Justin build a family fun zone that includes a waterfall, a fire pit, and a custom waterslide.

programme.title: Pool Kings: This Pool Goes Up
programme.desc: A young family in a new house is hoping for some help upgrading their backyard in the form of a top-notch swimming pool. The pool of their dreams has a waterfall, a customized spa and a fire feature that accentuates their beautiful Texas view.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Stay the Course
programme.desc: The Pool Kings head to Austin, Texas to build a pool alongside a golf course. The guys have their work cut out for them as they work to create a feature-filled pool that works in all seasons, provides privacy from golfers and matches the new patio.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Twice as Nice
programme.desc: A Kentucky couple seeks out the kings to help them revamp their worn-out lakeside swimming pool. The guys accept the challenge and turn the eyesore into a backyard paradise complete with a custom slide, secondary pool and more.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Mountain Paradise
programme.desc: The Kings take on their most spectacular project to date when a young family asks them to build the perfect pool for their dream home overlooking the mountains outside Ogden, Utah. They want the works including a 50 ft. long, 12 ft. deep pool.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Game Time
programme.desc: After dealing with hot summers and limited options for swimming, a Tennessee father has decided it's time to get a pool of his own. The Pool Kings are up for the task and create a sports pool that will provide endless entertainment.

programme.title: Pool Kings: All About the View
programme.desc: Steve and Justin are determined to convert a couple's neglected '80s-style pool into a modern lakeside paradise, but hidden engineering issues make this build more complicated than it seems.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Ponds Have More Fun
programme.desc: A Texas family wants a one-of-a-kind, natural-looking cocktail pool. The guys prove they are masters of the country pond when they build an expansive creek waterfall, natural rock steps, sunken boulders and custom concealed skimmers.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Crazy Good
programme.desc: Chefs share foods like tagliatelle pasta and white truffles, banana splits, and pot roast.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: With Garlic
programme.desc: Hosts dish on what their favourite dish that includes garlic are, from burgers to soup.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Decadent Regional Dishes
programme.desc: Baton Rouge, La. native and Food Network Star finalist, Jay Ducote, joins Michael Symon for a French and Cajun-inspired burger with a twist.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Super Chefs' Favorite Foods
programme.desc: Earl Campbell and Michael dig into juicy brisket and warm peach cobbler at Texas' most famous barbecue restaurants.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Mountains Of Meat
programme.desc: Michael Symon meets a chef bringing the Indian street food flavors of his childhood to Asheville, N.C., with his own take on a sloppy joe that he calls a Sloppy Jai, with lamb hash and 30 Indian spices.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Brunchtime Bbq
programme.desc: In Charleston, S.C., Michael Symon smokes a whole hog and makes chorizo from scratch for a saucy BBQ brunch burrito with two different fire-roasted salsas. In Atlanta, an authentic Caribbean roasted pork sandwich has a dedicated local following.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Twist On Texas 'cue
programme.desc: Roger Mooking visits two restaurants in the Lone Star State that turn traditional Texas-style barbecue into crafty culinary creations.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Hog Wild And Shuckling Delicious
programme.desc: Roger Mooking is firing up three different rigs to cook a whole hog, racks of ribs and bushels of oysters for the ultimate South Carolina-style surf and turf.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Texas 'Cue-Step in Georgia
programme.desc: Roger Mooking is in the Peach State visiting two self-taught pitmasters who smoke tasty Texas-style barbecue.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Light My Latin Fire
programme.desc: Roger Mooking fires up two delicioso Latin-inspired feasts. In St. Augustine, Fla., Roger meets Nick Carrera, a grill master and grill maker behind Urban Asado. They roast whole lambs and vegetables on Nick's asado crosses.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Kanazawa
programme.desc: Andrew introduces Kanazawa, Japan, a modern city filled with deep traditions. From regionally fished Kano crab to sushi built using aged rice and fresh seafood, he explores tantalizing eats that are unspoiled by international tourism.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: NOLA
programme.desc: New Orleans is a vibrant, eclectic city and its cuisine has been fused with a multitude of culinary influences. Andrew Zimmern explores the classic dishes from po' boys and gumbo to oysters Rockefeller and bananas Foster.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: New Jersey
programme.desc: Andrew checks out the inventive and international eats of New Jersey. He tries all-you-can-eat Brazilian meat, rich seafood stew, potato-loaded hot dogs and Dominican marinated pork.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Munich
programme.desc: As the proud capital of Bavaria and beer-drinking, Munich has built a cuisine around hearty dishes meant to stick to the bones. From schnitzel and spätzle to knöedel and cake, Andrew Zimmern reveals Munich's festival of foods.

programme.desc: Roger Mooking travels across America searching for the 12 best Tex-Mex dishes from beans, meats and peppers to salsas and gooey cheeses.

programme.title: Man's Greatest Food: Fried
programme.desc: From seafood and beef to pork and cheese, all the best foods taste better fried and Roger Mooking is scouring the country in search of the 12 best fried-food dishes. He's hanging out with fried-food-loving chefs learning all their secrets.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Fiery Outdoor Kitchens
programme.desc: Roger Mooking tames the flames in outdoor kitchens fueled by wood-burning fires. In Solvang, Calif., the Alisal Guest Ranch and Resort is home to 10,000 acres of land with horses, cattle and a bevy of fiery cooking contraptions.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Weekend BBQs
programme.desc: Roger visits two Southern California barbeque joints that serve smoked meat specialties on weekends.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Crazy Contraptions
programme.desc: Roger Mooking goes from the west coast to east coast to check out crazy contraptions.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Heating It Up In Hawaii
programme.desc: Things are heating up in Hawaii which inspires Roger Mooking to do some island-hopping for the best eats. On Oahu, Hawaii, Roger and farmer Daniel Anthony heat up an imu, a traditional underground oven, for a feast of cheeseburgers.

programme.title: Good Eats: The Big Chili
programme.desc: Join Host and cowpoke Gerald P Hobbs (Alton Brown) and his sidekick Rusty as they rustle up a good, honest bowl of red. Along the way, they'll ponder the chili mythology, grind up their own chili powder (that's chili with an i) and do some serious work.

programme.title: Good Eats: Say Cheese
programme.desc: Alton takes an in-depth look at his favourite food, cheese.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Zacho Libre
programme.desc: Noah Cappe heads to Charlotte, Mich. for the Eaton County Fair, where he takes a swing at the PB battered burger, then goes coco-nutty for the pina colada shrimp tacos.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Jurassic Pork
programme.desc: Noah Cappe bites into some classic Tennessee hot chicken, tastes authentic home cooking with Meme's meatloaf sammy, and samples a pair of sinfully sweet fusion treats.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: A Guac to Remember
programme.desc: Noah Cappe takes the west coast by storm, starting with the Pacific National Exhibition in Vancouver. He gorges on the Big Pickle Dog, then stands at attention for the Colonel Katsu Bao, an Asian-inspired chicken taco.

programme.desc: Bob takes the pugs on a dinner train but all the food's gone missing; When ARF's batteries run out, the pugs and pals try to rescue their robo-brother.

programme.desc: When a puppy gets lost at Adopt-A-Palooza, it's up to the pugs, Keia and their new friend to find it. Bingo, Rolly and Keia go off in search of Captain Wunderbark's long-lost ship.

programme.desc: The pugs try to hang something of Bob's in a famous Italian art museum. Bingo and Rolly look for the first snowflake of the season while helping other animals prepare for winter.

programme.title: T.O.T.S.: Hiccup Hazard/ The Great Robot Race
programme.desc: Pip’s hiccups threaten their delivery so he asks Freddy to do the impossible: scare them out of him. Pip and Freddy have to prove that delivery birds are better than a stork drone.

programme.title: T.O.T.S.: The Bouncy Bouncy Baby/ Like Cats and Dogs
programme.desc: Pip gets locked inside a crate with a baby kangaroo. Pip and Freddy must teach squabbling kitten and puppy siblings to share.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: A New Pup in Town / The Last Pup-icorn
programme.desc: When Chloe's new puppy, Keia, runs away, the pups must find her before Chloe returns! When Chloe wishes she could have a unicorn, Bingo, Rolly and Keia set out to find one.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Birthday Heros for Hero / Maple Cheer-Up
programme.desc: The pups must fix Hero's new birthday toy after Rolly and Keia accidentally break it. The Pugs head to Canada to save Bob's pancake surprise for Bonnie!

programme.title: PJ Masks: Secret of the Pagoda/ Storm of the Ninja
programme.desc: While Catboy is too busy trying to impress An Yu, Night Ninja enters the pagoda. An Yu tries to solve an ancient riddle to become a true Mountain Master.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Dinner Thief on the Puppytown Express / O' Brother, Where ARF Thou?

programme.title: Muppet Babies: How Kermit Got His Groove/ One Small Problem
programme.desc: When Rizzo the Rat arrives and makes a mess in the playroom, the only way the Muppet Babies can get him to stop is to defeat him in a dance-off. Summer is tired of being the smallest Muppet Baby and enlists Dr. Bunsen Honeydew and Beaker to help.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: My Sister the Weirdo/ Turf War
programme.desc: Jeanette wants to give a toast to Brittany at her upcoming party so she seeks advice from the most confident person she knows: Alvin. Needing to find a part time job, Alvin decides to 'borrow' Brittany's.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Good Luck Mr. Whiskers/ Who's Your Daddy
programme.desc: Theodore is convinced that Miss Croner's missing cat is the cause of a terrible curse. When Dave comes down with a bad cold, Alvin quickly offers to take over Dad duty.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Mystic Mountain/ Candy Confessions
programme.desc: Dave is concerned that the Chipmunks have become too obsessed with their latest video game. Grounded once again, Alvin begs Theodore to buy him a limited edition skateboard. But, Theodore uses the money to buy candy.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Mojo Missing/ Who's the Animal
programme.desc: Alvin is convinced his mojo was in a cap he gave to a fan, and must find a way to get his hat back before the Chipmunks' big concert. During a costume visit to the zoo, Alvin finds himself mistaken for the real Tasmanian devil.

programme.desc: Chandler is attracted to a woman he met at Central Perk, who turns out to be Joey's girl.

programme.title: Mike & Molly: Peggy Goes to Branson
programme.desc: When Peggy goes out of town, she leaves her dog with Mike and Molly, saying it will be good practice for having kids.

programme.title: Mom: Ambulance Chasers and a Babbling Brook
programme.desc: Christy’s demanding law professor leans on her a little too hard for support, and Bonnie’s plan to trick Adam into choosing a wedding venue backfires.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: I'd Like to Start With the Cat
programme.desc: Charlie finds himself in couples counselling.

programme.title: Black-ish: Auntsgiving
programme.desc: Pops' older sister, Almaviligerais, unexpectedly arrives for Thanksgiving, much to everyone's delight except Ruby, who can't stand her ex-sister-in-law.

programme.title: Black-ish: Dr. Hell No
programme.desc: After Dre gets his yearly physical and comes home traumatized, Pops explains his generation's strong aversion towards healthcare and admits that he hasn't seen a doctor in years.

programme.title: Riverdale: Chapter Seventy-Five: Lynchian
programme.desc: Jughead and Charles follow a new lead after the contents of the latest videotape takes a sinister turn. Kevin, Reggie and Fangs take their business venture to the next level. Cheryl and Veronica's maple rum business faces a new threat.

programme.title: Bulletproof: Episode 1
programme.desc: Pike and Bishop uncover a luxury car theft ring. Bishop accidentally shoots Jonesy.

programme.title: Friends: The One With Rachel's Date
programme.desc: Rachel's date with a soap star hunk has Ross in a funk, especially since she's pregnant.

programme.title: Seinfeld: The Dinner Party
programme.desc: Jerry and Elaine stop at a bakery to buy a cake for a dinner party, but forget to take a number. Kramer and George run into several obstacles while trying to get the wine.

programme.title: Mike & Molly: McMillan and Mom
programme.desc: Carl, Mike and Samuel take a road trip to Memphis to meet Carl's mother for the first time.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: She'll Still Be Dead at Halftime
programme.desc: Charlie has to remove a half-naked woman from his bedroom before Chelsea arrives and catches him with another woman.

programme.title: The Goldbergs: The President's Fitness Test
programme.desc: Adam is terrified of the upcoming Presidential Physical Fitness Test so Beverly decides to write him a note to get out of the test. The plan backfires when the gym teacher declares the only way to excuse Adam is a presidential pardon.

programme.title: The Goldbergs: Hail Barry
programme.desc: Barry joins the football team but is quickly benched by Coach Mellor due to his lack of playing ability. He convinces himself the coach is testing him; but soon realizes the truth of his playing abilities.

programme.title: 2 Broke Girls: And the Hold-Up
programme.desc: Max and Caroline show their true colours when the diner gets robbed. Meanwhile, everyone sees a surprising new side of Han.

programme.title: Daily Mail TV
programme.desc: Your number one source for celebrity news, gossip and photos.

programme.title: The Game: The Busted Episode
programme.desc: Tasha tries to salvage her friendship with Pookie after it's revealed she's been cheating. Meanwhile, Jason and Chardonnay have it out over her involvement in Tasha's love triangle.

programme.title: Last Man Standing: Where There's Smoke, There's Ire
programme.desc: Mandy takes a new interest in vaping, and while disappointing to her parents, it also sparks memories of Vanessa's old smoking habits. Later on, Mike finds out that Vanessa has been secretly smoking and must find a way to gently confront her.

programme.title: Funny You Should Ask
programme.desc: Guest stars include Jon Lovitz, Jackeé Harry, Louie Anderson, Byron Allen, Margaret Cho, and Howie Mandel.

programme.title: Couples Court With the Cutlers: Hammond vs. Hammond
programme.desc: A wife’s history of being a serial cheater has caused a man to doubt if she has truly changed her ways.

programme.title: America's Court With Judge Ross: In Your Own Words
programme.desc: Accusations of plagiarism and a failed group project.

programme.title: Justice With Judge Mablean: Woman to Woman
programme.desc: Two women are involved in a physical altercation over a man both had dated.

programme.title: Right This Minute
programme.desc: Stay up-to-date with the most viral videos online.

programme.title: Daily Mail TV
programme.desc: Your number one source for celebrity news, gossip and photos.

programme.title: Lauren Lake's Paternity Court: James vs Shimmel
programme.desc: A woman is certain her current fiancé is the biological father of her daughter after a their one-night stand two years ago, but he believes someone else is her child’s father.

programme.title: The Verdict With Judge Hatchett: Deadbeat Coach
programme.desc: A woman sues for the cost of her son's football program.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show: Threesome With My Mom!
programme.desc: Jade discovered her mom Brandy hooked up with her boyfriend. Mercedes wants out of her marriage with Chance to be with Rocky. Kinley wants to tell CJ about her crush on him but her mom Brittany says he isn't boyfriend material because she slept with him.

programme.title: Judge Mathis
programme.desc: An admitted cocaine addict says she was dating a man she met in Narcotics Anonymous, but after they moved in together, she claims he stole her money, so she’s suing.

programme.title: The People's Court
programme.desc: Segments include 'Making Mom Mad' and 'Conning College.'

programme.title: The People's Court
programme.desc: Segments include 'Copping Out On A Cousin', ' Fouling Up A Friendship' and 'Being A Tool.'

programme.title: Justice With Judge Mablean: Throw Me My Stuff/ Carnival
programme.desc: A man sues his girlfriend over property damage; a carnival costume is damaged.

programme.title: Judge Jerry
programme.desc: A man sues his former friend for unpaid rent; the defendant says he threw a fundraising party to raise the money for the rent and owes nothing. Then, sisters are in court over a van loan and an electric bill.

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: DNA: He Denies Our Daughters
programme.desc: Elliott denies being the father to Walnesha's daughters because of information given to him by a childhood friend. A paternity and a lie detector test are needed to clear up this uncertainty.

programme.title: Maury: Did My Fiancé Get This Woman Pregnant Again?
programme.desc: Deris said he was in another state when Makayla got pregnant and is not the father. During a split with Brandon, Brittany had two affairs, and wants to prove Brandon's her baby's father. Bernard is denying Nakia's daughter.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show: Fight Invite
programme.desc: Dominic wants his girlfriend Essence to move out so that he can move on…with another woman. Dominic says ever since moving in with Essence, she’s become lazy and sloppy.

programme.title: The Mel Robbins Show: What Happens When You're Not Raised by a Father
programme.desc: Jill is struggling to connect with her out-of-control teen that grew up without a father. She says he does drugs, stays out all night and disappears for days.

programme.title: Movie: The Station Agent
programme.desc: A man who was born with dwarfism finds his solitude interrupted by a vendor and a woman.

programme.title: Movie: Isn't It Romantic
programme.desc: After woman who has spent her whole life feeling cynical about love and romance suffers a nasty hit to the head, she wakes up to find herself living in a romantic comedy, complete with new friends and a new love interest vying for her attention.

programme.title: Movie: Bridesmaids
programme.desc: After being picked as her best friend's maid of honour, a broke woman tries to bluff her way through the expensive bridesmaid rituals.

programme.title: Movie: Betsy's Wedding
programme.desc: The parents of a bride and groom try to outdo each other while arranging the wedding.

programme.title: Movie: The Great White Hype
programme.desc: Boxing promoters stage a fight between a black world champion and a white unknown.

programme.title: Movie: Spanglish
programme.desc: A Hispanic single mother, who recently immigrated to California, must deal with both language and cultural barriers and her daughter's Americanization when she is employed as a housekeeper in a dysfunctional household.

programme.title: Movie: Easy Money
programme.desc: A hard-living gambling addict must change his lifestyle in order to inherit a fortune.

programme.title: Movie: Frankie and Johnny
programme.desc: An ex-con gets a job as a short-order cook in a diner and tries to win the heart of a waitress who no longer believes in love.

programme.title: Movie: They Came Together
programme.desc: A man's company threatens to run a woman's shop out of business, yet the two still fall in love. When things go south, the archetypal couple must overcome a series of classic hurdles in the rom-com genre before finding their way back to one another.

programme.title: Movie: Scary Movie 3
programme.desc: A girl investigates crop circles and video tapes while preventing an alien invasion.

programme.title: Movie: Rock the Kasbah
programme.desc: A has-been rock manager gets stranded in Afghanistan, where he discovers a young girl with a beautiful singing voice. Sure that she could win a national singing competition, he takes her on an adventure-of-a-lifetime in the hopes of reviving his career.

programme.title: Movie: The Thing About My Folks
programme.desc: A middle aged man must deal with his own emotional issues when his elderly parents divorce.

programme.title: Movie: Johnny English
programme.desc: An inept agent bungles his way through an investigation that uncovers a sinister plot.

programme.title: Movie: Big Momma's House 2
programme.desc: In order to get next to a computer expert whose new discovery may place national security at risk, Malcolm Turner must once again impersonate his grandmother. He poses as the hacker's nanny, but things get complicated when he gets close to the family.

programme.title: Movie: Hall Pass
programme.desc: Two best friends are granted permission by their wives to have extramarital affairs, but when their wives join in on the fun things get a little out of control.
